With entry into the European Union at stake, Albania must rely on a mash-up of elite cops to take down a slippery drug lord dominating its economy.
A special agent abruptly reunites with a criminal – once a former friend – when he attempts to use his identity to infiltrate and take down a cartel.
After a mysterious woman saves her daughter from a deadly snakebite, a single mother must repay the debt by killing a stranger before sundown.

director: Jumpei Mizusaki, Koji Morimoto, Michael Arias, Masaru Matsumoto, Arthell Isom, Henry Thurlow, Takanobu Mizuno, Elsa Nakamichi, Hajime Sasaki, Shinji Takagi
description: In this anime visual album, a mysterious driver heads deep into a postapocalyptic hellscape toward a ferocious showdown with two monstrous opponents.
In this twisty horror-thriller, a once-promising music prodigy reconnects with her former mentors, only to find them taken with a talented new pupil.
When a prank goes wrong, a shy kid from Compton is sent away for murder. Four years later, he’s back and out for revenge on homecoming weekend.
The U.S. Navy Seal team tackles a top-secret mission at a research center where scientists have mysteriously disappeared and another life form awaits.
Bruce Springsteen shares personal stories from his life and acoustic versions of some of his best-known songs in an intimate one-man show.
After a look-alike takes over her account, a cam girl with a growing fan base sets out to identify the mysterious culprit and reclaim her own identity.
During a wilderness getaway, a gang of sociopathic criminals kidnap a woman and assault her husband, who must summon all his strength to save her.
A game of "Truth or Dare" among college friends on spring break turns deadly when a demon seems determined to use it to kill them all.
A former addict moves to a new city with her children for a fresh start, but her struggle soon takes on an unexpected, supernatural dimension.
A team of mercenaries working with the CIA accepts an off-the-books mission in Chernobyl, where deadly human-controlled droids prepare an ambush.
A video artist finds the perfect character for a sensational piece, but the subject of her dreams soon reveals his insidious side.
On the run from authorities, a troubled man recalls the mysterious events – and the strange drifter – that inspired his unusual transformation.
Country music star Brad Paisley hosts a night of music and laughs with comics Nate Bargatze, John Heffron, Jon Reep, Sarah Tiana and Mike E. Winfield.

Movie_Title: Garfunkel and Oates: Trying to be Special
description: Garfunkel and Oates put on a surprise-filled show in Seattle in hopes of raising enough money to make their own comedy special.
The comic innovator delivers a surreal set blending experimental songs, jokes about grits, guns and drugs, and other improvised comedy adventures.
On the final nights of a world tour, director Jonathan Demme captures what makes the show soar: gifted musicians, deft dancers and a magnetic star.
Combining his trademark wit and self-deprecating humor with original music, Bo Burnham offers up his unique twist on life in this stand-up special.
A defiant warrior-monk arrives at Kublai Khan's court in chains and soon earns his tragic nickname in this 30-minute origin story.

Movie_Title: BoJack Horseman Christmas Special: Sabrina's Christmas Wish
description: It's Christmas, and BoJack wants nothing to do with it. Then Todd shows up with a giant candy cane and an old "Horsin' Around" Christmas episode.
After committing suicide, a washed-up rocker returns from the grave to torment the five people who betrayed him in life.
Upping the “13 Cameras” ante, this sequel finds a family renting a vacation house that’s been customized to violate their privacy.
Seeking her independence, a young woman moves to Los Angeles and settles into a cozy apartment complex with a disturbing sense of community.
Student filmmakers uncover occult rituals tied to an abandoned warehouse, then gradually realize the horror is closer than they think.
In the frozen tundra of a futuristic Arizona where humans have been forced underground, a soldier hunts the bioengineered leader of a rebellion.
A horror novelist with a traumatic past returns to her childhood hometown, where she revisits her night terrors and loses sight of reality.
A tough-as-nails treasure hunter protects a humanitarian doctor as she tries to cure a supernatural disease caused by a mysterious witch.
An escaped psychopathic child killer faces off against one of his former victims, who has since become a hard-nosed detective.
After discovering that their secret military prison is under attack by terrorists, a ragtag group of inmates does their best to neutralize the enemy.
When four college friends reunite for a bachelor party, their hunt for cash said to be hidden in Kentucky's backwoods leads to bloodshed and betrayal.
When their diverse neighborhood is besieged by a mysterious militia, a grad student and an ex-Marine become an unlikely team in a battle for survival.
Along with her son and best friend, a grieving widow hikes into the woods to scatter her late husband's ashes, only to discover they're being stalked.
A suburban couple hires a new sitter to watch their three kids for the night, unaware that the young woman isn't who she claims to be.
On the run from his meth-dealing employers, a drifter with a drinking problem becomes prey in a desert town's twisted hunting contest.
When a fraternity's last big luau serves up horrible deaths to its partygoers, the brothers learn firsthand about their house’s frightening history.
An alcoholic with a tragic past rents an apartment in a building for those in recovery, but soon learns the truth about residents who get "evicted."
A group of college students on a weekend getaway accidentally summon a supernatural entity intent on using them for its deadly ritual.
A shy, brilliant boy and a popular girl fall into an unexpected romance. But as their bond deepens, his attraction begins taking on dark overtones.
When she finally encounters two other survivors, a woman alone in a world decimated by a zombie epidemic struggles to trust her new companions.
While serving as the marshal of rowdy Abilene, Kansas, "Wild Bill" Hickok uses guns and gall to tidy up the lawless frontier town.
Posing as a telecom salesman at a business conference, a CIA agent fights to protect a fledgling Eastern European democracy from a military coup.

Movie_Title: Kygo: Live at the Hollywood Bowl
description: Join Norwegian electronic music superstar Kygo onstage and behind the scenes as he performs at the famed L.A. venue with a bevy of special guests.
After receiving a strange present, a professor and his pregnant wife are plagued by tragedy and a paranormal presence that's determined to kill.
During the War of 1812, two Native Americans and their British ally are pursued into enemy territory by American soldiers thirsting for revenge.
In the midst of ann arduous divorce battle, a real estate tycoon opts for a life of partying and sex until feelings for his childhood friend surface.

Movie_Title: Seal Team Six: The Raid on Osama Bin Laden
description: In this dramatic recreation, U.S. Navy SEAL Team 6 trains for a critical mission, then executes a tough nighttime raid on Osama Bin Laden's compound.
When a drug lord kidnaps his girlfriend’s daughter, a retired assassin leaves his newly peaceful life to go on a ruthless rampage to rescue the child.
Two siblings invite friends to their inherited, remote country home, but the fun stops when the group summons a demonic force from an old spellbook.
After a near-death trip home, a Marine looking to help his comrade survive returns to the underground world of MMA, where new battles await.
On Halloween night, inside a dilapidated apartment building, Art the Clown stalks his victims, slicing and slaughtering in terrifying silence.
Known for tortuous role-play with victims in his basement, a twisted serial killer abducts a musician who has a deeper connection to his mind games.
A couple's new dream home morphs into a nightmare after they learn that an evil and lustful spirit resides in their basement.
His way of life under threat due to the oil fracking boom, a young rancher defends a Lakota woman and becomes entangled in human trafficking.
Terrorized by unexplained disturbances and horrific visions in her home, a young widowed mother turns to her scientist boyfriend for help.
Child psychologist Tom Seymour's testimony helped convict a boy of murder. Years later, their paths cross again, raising uncomfortable questions.
Starting with the Trojan Horse attack, this modest re-telling of Homer's epic covers well-known highlights of Odysseus's long journey home.
When a yoga enthusiast begins to pull away from her identical twin sister and business partner, their lifelong bond turns deadly.
In need of cash to help her sick brother, a young woman agrees to take part in a lethal winner-takes-all parlor game hosted by a sadistic millionaire.
Seth Rogen and James Franco star in this provocative comedy about two journalists recruited by the CIA after they arrange an interview with Kim Jong-un.
Comedians Steve Harvey, Cedric the Entertainer, D.L. Hughley and Bernie Mac hit the stage in an iconic stand-up concert directed by Spike Lee.
Accompanied by a German bounty hunter, a freed slave named Django travels across America to free his wife from a sadistic plantation owner.
A vampire warrior begins to question her mission in the ancient war between the undead and werewolves when she falls for a human under her protection.

Movie_Title: Rogue Warfare: Death of a Nation
description: As their leader recovers from trauma, a global team of elite soldiers must regroup and stop the deadly plans of an extremist mastermind within 36 hours.
Isolated on a wind-ravaged 19th-century homestead, a frontierswoman begins to suspect that evil lurks in the terrifying emptiness all around her.
When a disgraced ex-cop discovers a dying woman, he's compelled to track down her killer — an act of self-redemption that takes him down a dark path.
In Los Angeles, recently paroled O2 teams up with a street-smart hustler when a gang hijacks his car and holds his son for ransom.
Two paramedics begin to question their realities after coming across several bizarre deaths linked to a new narcotic with mind-bending effects.
Armed with a mighty ancient amulet, a team of weapons experts joins forces to defend Los Angeles from supervillains with explosive powers of their own.
Estranged brothers Beckett and Rowan reunite in the Alaskan wild to confront a savage grizzly bear wreaking havoc on their hometown.
A serial killer picks off a group of friends, one by one, as they make their way through a hell-themed amusement park.
With no memory of the previous night, a vacationing couple uncovers a disturbing personal video that inexplicably shows one of them killing the other.
A wrong turn in the woods becomes a fight for her life when a career-seeking college student runs into two outlaw brothers looking to cook up trouble.
As heavy metal band Metallica tears up the stage, a young roadie is sent on an urgent errand. But his mission soon takes a surreal turn.
Six teens whose cyberbullying drove their classmate to kill herself become the target of an online stalker with a lethal agenda.
A group of vastly outnumbered U.S. soldiers at a remote Afghanistan base must fend off a brutal offensive by Taliban fighters in the Battle of Kamdesh.
At a basketball game, an ex-Special Forces officer must face a group of tech-savvy hostiles when a team owner and his daughter are taken hostage.
A night at a 1980s heavy metal concert hits a grisly note when new friends find themselves in the middle of a satanic murder spree.
When their leader is captured by an extremist organization, a special forces team stages a perilous rescue mission as time runs out.
Four African American veterans return to Vietnam decades after the war to find their squad leader's remains — and a stash of buried gold. From Spike Lee.
When a couple in the fast lane to splitsville accidentally careens into a murder, they take off on a wild race to find the killer and clear their names.
Confined to an attic for years by a man claiming to be her protector, teenage Anna is liberated and begins learning the rest of her terrifying story.
An elite international squad of uniquely skilled special forces is assembled to combat a rising underground terrorist threat in the Middle East.
Stranded when the Earth is suddenly destroyed in a mysterious cataclysm, the astronauts aboard a marooned space station slowly lose their minds.
Hidden away by her eccentric father, a mysterious young girl uncovers frightening truths when she starts to make contact with the outside world.
Fresh off a bad relationship, thrill-seeking Martha finds romance and danger with Francis, a hit man who's decided to turn the tables on his clients.
A U.S. Marshal arrives at a small town in Nevada, only to learn that his preacher brother is dead after standing up to the town's mayor and outlaws.
After being reunited with a brother he thought was killed in combat, a former army medic begins to experience violent, paranoid visions.
In this action-packed drama based on an extraordinary true story, four brothers protect more than 1,000 Jewish refugees during World War II.
Determined to save an Amazon tribe being squeezed by logging, a group of students finds nothing but trouble when their plane crashes in the jungle.
Two mischievous boys get thrust into a game of cat and mouse with a murderous psychopath after they decide to steal a police officer’s cruiser.
In this sequel to the 1991 film, a determined fire investigator recruits an imprisoned arsonist to help untangle a web of fire, murder and corruption.
Buckle up for an anthology of socially conscious horror stories that focus on the perils of racial injustice and the price of ignorance.
An ex-racecar driver is sent to a barbaric prison where, to get pardoned, he must defeat the inmate known as Frankenstein in a lethal "Death Race."
Kidnapped by an inventor who uses her as a test subject to perfect his robotic AI, a street-smart young woman tries to escape her high-tech prison.
In the wake of an extraterrestrial invasion, a suspended L.A. cop teams up with survivors to stop the onslaught and rescue human captives.
Years after the Civil War, a bounty hunter and his captive are waylaid by a Wyoming blizzard and hole up in a way station with six dicey strangers.
When amateur ghost hunters visit an abandoned house, their investigation turns into a massacre, leaving questions for a detective and a psychologist.
Frenetic comic Kevin Hart hits Philadelphia and dishes on suburban wildlife, jean shorts and the fine art of getting even with a 7-year-old.
A man agrees to appear on a game show with a $6 million prize. But as the challenges become more extreme, he realizes he's made a grave mistake.
Obsessed with an unsolved murder case, a crime novelist stuck in an unhappy marriage fantasizes about killing his wife, who soon turns up dead.
An American tourist and his friends are partying in Chile, but a major earthquake devastates the area and forces them to scramble for survival.

Movie_Title: All the Boys Love Mandy Lane
description: During a weekend excursion to a secluded ranch, an unwelcome visitor begins picking off the randy admirers of teenage temptress Mandy Lane.
A tenderfoot and two gamblers seeking their fortunes in a boom town instead find themselves defending it from a gunslinging preacher and his gang.
When U.S. forces attempt to capture two underlings of a Somali warlord, their helicopters are shot down and the Americans suffer heavy casualties.
Bad news from the past unhinges vagabond Dwight Evans, sending him on a mission of bloody retribution that takes him to his childhood hometown.
Teenage loner Brendan Fry navigates his high school's intense social network to discover a killer's identity after his secret crush is murdered.
Suspecting her husband of infidelity, Catherine hires sexy Chloe to test his faithfulness. Soon, the relationships between all three intensify.
Two federal agents battle through an army of rioting prisoners – and their sense of reality – inside a high-tech prison modeled after Dante’s Inferno.
A man with a history of mental issues moves into his late parents' mansion and comes to suspect his new home may be haunted.

Movie_Title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark
description: Young Sally Hurst discovers she isn't alone in her new house: strange creatures live there – and they might not be as friendly as Sally thinks.
A security expert and ex-CIA agent living in Belgium must go on the run with his estranged teen daughter when they're both marked for assassination.
In a dystopian future, a totalitarian regime maintains peace by subduing the populace with a drug, and displays of emotion are punishable by death.
As a notorious outlaw comes to grips with his past, he reconnects with his estranged daughter and gets one more shot to make things right.
A struggling couple can't believe their luck when they find a stash of money in the apartment of a neighbor who was recently murdered.
After a car crash, a criminal psychiatrist awakens to find that she's a patient in the same mental institution that currently employs her.
At the end of their low-budget tour, a punk band accepts a gig at an isolated rural club, only to discover that their hosts are neo-Nazis.
A homicide detective, a criminal profiler and a journalist team up to nab a serial killer whose murders are inspired by the classic game of Hangman.
While vacationing at a remote lake house, a mother and her daughters become pawns in the twisted game of an ax-wielding psychopath.
When best friends break a blood oath, one of them is cast away to hell, and the other two must save him from the misfits of the underworld.
A hired gun has second thoughts when he's contracted to kill a teenage girl whose father's shady business dealings put her life in danger.
A naive and sheltered young woman embarks on a whimsical adventure across Italy in the hopes of meeting director Federico Fellini.

Movie_Title: Kevin Hart: Laugh at My Pain
description: Sometimes edgy and always hilarious, comedian Kevin Hart shines in this theatrical version of his record-breaking 2011 live tour.
Philadelphia funnyman Kevin Hart takes the stage in front of a sold-out crowd at Madison Square Garden, part of his hit "Let Me Explain" world tour.
Sloan's vow to never return to Thailand is cut short when he's kidnapped and taken to a Thai prison, where he's forced to fight a 400-pound brute.
This true crime tale charts the rise and fall of mobster Danny Greene, who faced down the Mafia to gain control of organized crime in 1970s Cleveland.
A devoted husband and father on his own for the weekend has his life turned inside out after giving shelter to two young women during a storm.
This provocative film sheds light on actor-comedian Martin Lawrence's roots, his rise to fame and his walk on the wild side.
Two corporate spies with a $5 million haul for selling secrets are held hostage by a thief, triggering a game of cat and mouse to gain the upper hand.
Fallen Los Angeles police officer Terrence Downe finds new life as a secret weapon: a scientifically altered super-cop with unlimited lives.
This fictionalized account of three real-life notorious Harlem drug dealers is told in flashbacks as they plunge into the world of hustling.
When Katie and Micah fear their home may be haunted by a demonic presence, Micah sets up a video camera to document all the action.
In this dystopian sequel, kills equal points in a violently gory annual cross-country road race sponsored by the United Corporations of America.
A diamond heist goes horribly wrong, and the group of friends who sought to make a fortune must instead fight for their very survival.
A forensic psychiatrist has to think outside the box when she takes on a patient whose multiple personalities lead to a trail of murder victims.
After a mission to rescue a U.S. congressman from the Taliban ends with two men left behind, their sniper buddies go against orders to get them back.
Framed for the murder of an ambassador, a former member of the United Nations' elite covert action unit will do whatever it takes to clear his name.
After an architect transforms a slaughterhouse into trendy lofts, its new inhabitants discover that the structure is haunted by its evil past.
At the remote farmhouse where she once witnessed a traumatic childhood event, a young woman develops a grisly fascination with violence.
In World War II, a battalion goes on a daring rescue mission to liberate the Americans and Filipinos who've been captured by the Japanese.
Four young women head to a country house for an idyllic weekend retreat. But what lies in store for them is far from the dreamy getaway they imagined.
New straight-arrow sheriff Wallace finds he must join forces with brutal ex-lawman Leland to protect a troubled border town from a cartel hit man.
When an ex-cop becomes a superintendent of an apartment building, he suspects the sinister janitor is behind the eerie disappearances of its tenants.
When a group of hijackers takes passengers aboard a subway train hostage and demand a ransom, it's up to dispatcher Walter Garber to bring them down.
Discovering the location of a vault where a drug ring keeps its riches, two run-of-the-mill Las Vegas cops hatch a dicey plan to burgle it.
When a wise-guy podcaster interviews a disabled seafarer, he decides to embark on a transformational quest to track down a dangerous walrus-monster.
A masked freedom fighter known as "V" takes up arms against a totalitarian government and finds an unlikely ally in a young woman.
A young man house-sits for his mean boss, hoping to use it as an opportunity to win the heart of the boss's daughter, on whom he's long had a crush.
A troubled teenager finds high school life even less bearable after she catches her childhood best friend hooking up with her popular older brother.
When a has-been music producer gets stuck in Afghanistan he discovers a girl with a wonderful voice, then has to find a way to market her talents.
On a bet, a gridiron hero at John Hughes High School sets out to turn a bespectacled artist into a prom queen in this outrageous parody.
An offbeat foursome takes a wild journey through the Southern belt of denial to sell a relic purporting to prove the South won the Civil War.
A man with bipolar disorder moves home with his parents and makes a connection with a spirited widow, which helps both of them heal in unique ways.
After two small-time crooks kidnap and ransom a rich businessman's wife, they discover a flaw in their plan: Her cheating husband doesn't want her back.

Movie_Title: Zack and Miri Make a Porno
description: Zack and Miri make and star in an adult film to bring in easy money. But their unspoken feelings for each other might threaten the whole enterprise.
Her career in shambles, a reclusive movie star hires her stand-in to go to rehab for her, not expecting how much the look-alike will relish the role.

Movie_Title: Tenacious D in The Pick of Destiny
description: Dreaming of being a rock god, Midwesterner JB heads to California, where he crosses paths with idler KG – giving rise to the musical duo Tenacious D.
A seemingly clueless idealist relies on his exasperated sisters for shelter and support after his girlfriend dumps him and his dog is taken away.
A quiet holiday dinner among friends turns into a chaotic night of illicit activity and compromising situations when uninvited guests crash the party.
The only downside to a young couple’s new dream home — and fresh start — is the nightmare of the raucous houseguest in back who refuses to leave.
A sex therapist with pituitary issues finally gets to experience puberty in all its glory at age 30, when an operation unleashes his raging hormones.
To claim a big inheritance, a down-on-his-luck mechanic must win a series of competitions as outlined in his birth father's will.
Desperate for a breakthrough as she nears the big 4-0, struggling New York City playwright Radha finds inspiration by reinventing herself as a rapper.
Four tight-knit high school seniors vow to turn their love lives around by homecoming when the arrival of a new student muddles their plans.
In major debt to a loan shark, a nightclub owner who's entered in a celebrity death pool tries to murder a famous figure for half a million dollars.
Bound for art school, a sheltered student gets roped into the antics of a freewheeling mechanic who hitches a ride after fixing his car.
An entrepreneur develops an adult entertainment online billing company – and winds up dealing with mobsters, the FBI, con men and terrorists.
An intrepid high schooler in Sacramento undergoes the trials of love, family and self-discovery as she dreams of escaping to college on the East Coast.
Aspiring actor Greg moves to Los Angeles with his strange friend Tommy, then agrees to star in his movie. Things start weird and get a lot weirder.
New York police detectives Luis and Eddie experience culture shock and adventure when they head to Paris to track down a stolen couture handbag.
Two guys hope to reunite their friend with his runaway bride, unaware that he's been carjacked, stripped and stranded in the Mexican desert.
When three college pals hit the road to compete in a big-time beer pong tournament, their trip morphs into an outrageous odyssey.
On the verge of divorce, a middle-aged couple, each involved in a serious affair, rethink their marriage and the meaning of love and fidelity.
When a beloved secret agent falls deep into a coma, his bumbling brother must defend their community from a divisive political threat.
In 1970s LA, struggling comedian Rudy Ray Moore hits it big with his raunchy alter ego, Dolemite, then risks it all to take his act to the big screen.
When a widow gets swindled out of insurance money, her search for answers leads to two cunning lawyers in Panama who hide cash for the superrich.
This insightful drama looks at the crumbling marriage between a self-centered novelist – whose career is waning – and his up-and-coming writer wife.
When longtime friends meet up for a wine-soaked birthday getaway in Napa Valley, their perfectly planned weekend turns messier by the minute.
On the heels of a blindsiding breakup, music journalist Jenny braces for a new beginning – and one last adventure with her closest friends.
Struggling to conceive, a couple in their 40s are almost out of options – until a sliver of hope arrives in the form of their visiting step-niece.
A newcomer ekes out a living in LA as a professional audience member on infomercials, but life gets complicated when he's thrust into the spotlight.
Four preschool moms with little in common need a night out to take a break from their kids. But one thing leads to another, and things get rowdy.
After an ugly divorce, a wealthy but unhappy man trains at a local gym and develops a strange relationship with the owner and a captivating trainer.
A young novelist's life is turned upside down when a chance encounter outside a New York hotel leads to an intense affair with a diplomat's wife.
An otherwise healthy twentysomething has a comically early midlife crisis when he gets slapped with a cancer diagnosis and a 50-50 chance of survival.
A hapless guy agrees to help his stunning – but psychotic – girlfriend rob her loathsome sugar daddy in a scheme as ill-conceived as it is violent.

Movie_Title: A Glimpse Inside the Mind of Charles Swan III
description: When his girlfriend walks out and leaves him a wreck, a graphic designer – who seemed to have it all – sets out to discover where he went wrong.
With every aspect of his life unraveling, a Jewish physics professor seeks out three rabbis for spiritual guidance.
Fearless provocation has fueled stand-up comic Nina Geld's career, but a move to LA and a new love take her to new levels of honesty.
A young married couple tries to save their disintegrating relationship by turning their fights into songs, with the help of an oddball neighbor.
Cracking under the demands of children and a philandering, thankless husband, an overworked suburban mother assumes the persona of a ferocious dog.

Movie_Title: Blue Mountain State: The Rise of Thadland
description: New NFL star Thad buys his old teammates' beloved frat house, renames it Thadland and throws the raunchiest, most debauched party in school history.
Will Ferrell stars as a Spanish-speaking cowboy in this comedy about a Mexican clan trying to rescue their ranch from greedy creditors.
Six talented but struggling improv comics see a sudden shift in their troupe's dynamic after one of them lands a much-coveted gig on television.
Determined to make it as a modern dancer in New York, a young woman pursues her unlikely goal with more enthusiasm than natural talent.
When he's seen dispatching a rude opposing hockey player in the stands, Doug Glatt is hired by a rival team ... for his fighting skills.
In this witty whodunit, wealthy guests and their servants gather for a weekend stay at the home of Sir William McCordle, who is soon found murdered.

Movie_Title: Jay and Silent Bob Strike Back
description: Jay and Silent Bob's comic book alter egos have been sold to Hollywood without permission, so they head to Tinseltown to sabotage the production.
When a big-city art dealer travels to North Carolina to meet her new husband's small-town family, their trip gives rise to a multitude of problems.
A kid with a heart condition falls for an ex-stripper with a lot of baggage and joins her Alcoholics Anonymous group to catch her attention.
When Melvin and his friends gather for dinner, their casual conversation takes a sharp turn as they begin to disclose raw truths about themselves.
The biggest pranksters on YouTube – VitalyzdTV, Dennis Roady and Roman Atwood – turn Hollywood into "Prankwood" with their most over-the-top stunts.
After being fired from her job and dumped by her cheating boyfriend, a comedian has a one-night stand. Weeks later, she finds out she's pregnant.
A team of journalists are sent to find out who's behind a classified ad seeking a companion for time travel, then must decide how to approach him.
Desperately clinging to her youth, 28-year-old Megan tells her boyfriend she's attending a career seminar but hangs out with a teenage friend instead.

Movie_Title: Sex and the City: The Movie
description: When Carrie's big step forward in her relationship goes awry, best friends Charlotte, Miranda and Samantha are there to help her pick up the pieces.
After the death of their beloved mother, three foster sisters find their bond tested by old grudges, career tensions and a startling revelation.
An unexpected romance and a surprise visit from his wild brother turn the life of widowed professor Lawrence Wetherhold upside down.
Four cash-strapped college women run afoul of the law — and fall in with a shady hustler — as they join the annual rite of bikinis, beer and debauchery.

Movie_Title: The Goods: Live Hard, Sell Hard
description: Hired to rescue a flagging car dealership during a major sale, a fast-talking closer spends his days on the lot and his nights at local strip clubs.
While gathering evidence against his employer to help the FBI build a price-fixing case, Mark Whitacre begins to piece together a fantasy world.

Movie_Title: The Men Who Stare at Goats
description: A journalist latches onto an unbelievable story in Iraq when he meets Lyn, a man of mysterious origins who reveals he was a "warrior monk."
Confronted with the potential end of their marriage, Ethan and Sophie take off for a weekend together, hoping to negotiate their future.
Johnny Depp stars in this adaptation of Hunter S. Thompson's novel about a boozy journalist who moves to Puerto Rico and falls for a taken woman.
Surprise news that his girlfriend is pregnant sends loutish Owen on an ill-advised trip to reconnect with his twisted sister and sadistic grandmother.
Ryan Bingham flies around the country firing employees on behalf of companies, but he faces losing the job he savors to recent college grad Natalie.
Hunting for a stash of stolen money, a sharp-witted slacker from South Central Los Angeles infiltrates an all-white college fraternity.
A documentary filmmaker struggling with a creative block meets a vibrant young hipster couple who, initially, bring new energy into his life and work.
With his acting career moribund, Aidan Bloom steers a new tack in life, taking over his children's education when private school becomes too costly.
When a divorced writer gets a letter from an old boyfriend announcing his wife's had a baby, she returns to her hometown to reconnect with her ex.
This drama follows a wounded Civil War soldier making the long journey home, while his faraway love fights for survival on her deceased father's farm.
When a woman reports that her infant son was kidnapped by a black man, an African American detective and a white activist team up to dig for details.
Struggling to raise his little sister on his own, a young street magician turns to drug dealing, unaware of how ruthless his supplier can be.
When their father disappears, three strong-willed women return to their childhood home and to their equally strong-willed mother.
After her husband is sent to prison for eight years, medical student Ruby shelves her studies to focus on her partner's welfare as he serves his time.
Bereft of opportunities in the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina, a young man and his close friends turn to a life of crime in the 9th Ward of New Orleans.
Haunted by a nightmare involving her abusive ex-boyfriend, an actress begins to question her reality and whether the incident took place.
Tessa fell hard and fast for Hardin, but after a betrayal tears them apart, she must decide whether to move on — or trust him with a second chance.
Tensions and temperatures rise at a Chicago music studio in 1927 when fiery, fearless blues singer Ma Rainey joins her band for a recording session.
1930s Hollywood is reevaluated through the eyes of scathing wit and alcoholic screenwriter Herman J. Mankiewicz as he races to finish “Citizen Kane.”
This dramatic rendering of a real-life tragedy recounts the final hours of Oscar Grant, shot by San Francisco transit police on New Year's Day, 2009.
A family man plots to kill a spellbinding sex worker but ends up in a psychosexual exercise to outwit his twisted target.
At a birthday party in 1968 New York, a surprise guest and a drunken game leave seven gay friends reckoning with unspoken feelings and buried truths.
Sinister characters converge around a young man devoted to protecting those he loves in a postwar backwoods town teeming with corruption and brutality.
Shattered after her mother's death, a woman floats away from reality under the effect of a potent, hallucinatory drug as her life decays into chaos.
With his debts mounting and angry collectors closing in, a fast-talking New York City jeweler risks everything in hopes of staying afloat and alive.
A reformed LA gang member upends his peaceful new life when he steps in to protect two young immigrants from his violent former leader.
A military veteran comes home to find her father harassed by a sheriff intent on confiscating the livestock on their ranch under shady pretenses.
While serving life in prison, a young man looks back at the people, the circumstances and the system that set him on the path toward his crime.
Over a series of birthdays, a happy-go-lucky, commitment-averse fashion designer strives to bring a bit of calm to her chaotic love life.
An ambitious prospector strikes it rich and turns a simple village into a boomtown, stoking the ire of a charismatic young preacher.
After a botched job, a heist mastermind must run from gangsters and stay alive long enough for his daughter to benefit from his life insurance policy.
A sweet misfit with a fondness for crafts, horses and supernatural crime shows finds her increasingly lucid dreams trickling into her waking life.
After his longtime partner is assassinated, a slow-footed cowboy sets out to find his killer and uncovers a conspiracy engineered by some powerful men.
A small-town dreamer is sure he's landed on a gold mine after accidentally filming a murder but is sucked into a violent tale of greed and deception.
This stream-of-consciousness drama centers on a day in the life of a gay college professor who's reeling from his longtime lover's recent death.
A feared critic, an icy gallery owner and an ambitious assistant snap up a recently deceased artist's stash of paintings – with dire consequences.
A devoted teacher takes interest in a young student's creative potential after hearing his poetry. But she soon crosses the line into obsession.
After enrolling in a college poetry course, a struggling rapper finds inspiration for her new voice through slam poetry.
Two Mississippi families – one black, one white – confront the brutal realities of prejudice, farming and friendship in a divided World War II era.
Spirited 22-year-old activist and photojournalist Dan Eldon rushes to the frontline of a dangerous relief effort for Somalian refugees in this biopic.
A grieving mother takes a road trip with her friend to confront the man who, she believes, stole her late son's business idea to get rich.
Banished to a wasteland of undesirables, a young woman struggles to find her feet among a drug-soaked desert society and an enclave of cannibals.
Nina thinks her husband, James, is cheating on her, and she sets out to prove it by calling him and pretending to be another woman.
After a popular professor is attacked on a New York street, the story of how a series of intertwined events led to the life-altering assault unfolds.
An influential, if unsung country songwriter reflects on his career, and how the love of his life drove him to write his most personal music.
Three cops find themselves hurtling toward the same crime scene on one fatal night in this tense, edge-of your-seat thriller.
A lesbian housewife, feeling trapped in a stale marriage, begins visiting female prostitutes and soon seeks excitement by becoming a sex worker.
In post-Sept. 11 Los Angeles, tensions erupt when the lives of people from all walks of life converge during a 36-hour period.
Refusing to accept a death sentence from his doctor after being diagnosed with AIDS in 1986, Ron Woodroof smuggles medications from abroad.
Years after surviving a brutal crime as a child, Libby Day comes to believe that the brother she testified against for committing it may be innocent.
When a young newlywed enters the one chamber in her husband’s mansion that’s off-limits, she faces the horrifying consequences of defying the rules.
This adaptation of Ntozake Shange's play consists of a series of poetic vignettes that explore the lives of modern African American women.
On a Mohawk reservation on the Canadian border, Ray Eddy teams with a widowed tribe member to smuggle illegal immigrants into the United States.
In the crime-ridden slums of New York in the 1860s, vengeful orphan Amsterdam Vallon joins the cutthroat gang of his father's killer, Bill the Butcher.
As Tommy Egan pilots armed drones over Afghanistan from the safe comfort of Las Vegas, the remote nature of his work begins to raise moral questions.
Love comes to a lonely writer in the sleekest of packages when he finds himself falling for the advanced operating system he bought to run his life.
Accused of murder, Ig Perish wakes up one day to find he's grown a set of horns – compelling people to confess their sins to him.
After a long career battling the Cheyenne, a U.S. Army captain is ordered to safely escort the tribe's most influential chief to his Montana homeland.
Adapted from the hit Broadway musical, this nostalgic look at the Four Seasons and their bumpy offstage lives stretches across four decades.
After 10 years away from her family, Krisha returns for Thanksgiving, but bitter grudges and troubling addictions threaten to ruin the event.
During an evening apart, married couple Joanna and Michael encounter tempting opportunities to cheat on each other with sexy acquaintances.
After each of them loses a child to murder, two women who meet in a support group initiate their own investigation when the police are no help.
A gambler mired in debt thinks another cardsharp may just be his good luck charm as the two head for New Orleans to buy into a high-stakes poker game.
A lethal game of cat and mouse stretches from the desert to Tinseltown after Hollywood bad boy Thomas runs afoul of a cunning and dangerous drifter.
In a crime-infested Miami neighborhood, a gay African-American boy with a drug-addicted mother grows up with the help of a mentoring drug dealer.
As the new kid, a shy high school senior finds himself tormented by all his peers except one. But his new friend has a dark, infectious outlook.
A pair of young environmentalists enlist the help of an ex-military explosives expert to carry out a dangerous act of eco-terrorism.
In the wake of a young artist’s suicide, his pianist mother and his despairing girlfriend square off in a living nightmare beset by guilt and blame.
Longstanding family conflicts resurface when a former model who's been in and out of rehab for a decade returns home for her sister's wedding.
Two detectives investigate a rash of vigilante killings linked to an old case, suggesting they might have put an innocent man behind bars.
A reserved high school freshman acts out when she recovers a diary that offers clues to a secret world that could be behind her sister's murder.
A new charge at a foster care facility dredges up the memories of a young supervisor's own troubled past, and her tough exterior begins eroding.
A team of reporters and editors at the Boston Globe relentlessly investigate a shocking child molestation cover-up by the Catholic Church.

Movie_Title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street
description: After being falsely imprisoned, a vengeful murderer covers his tracks by enlisting the help of a baker whose meat pies become the toast of London.
In a remote Alaskan town reeling from a sudden triple murder, a former rodeo champ befriends a lone newcomer with a violent occupation.
Author Stephen Elliott has a problem separating his own life from incidents in the life of a convicted murderer about whom he's writing a book.
Husband. Father. Fighter. Meet Chuck Wepner, the liquor salesman and self-proclaimed real-life inspiration behind Rocky Balboa.
New York City radio host Erica Bain decides to take the law into her own hands after losing her fiancé in a brutal Central Park attack.
A successful businessman comes face-to-face with America's downsizing epidemic when he loses his job and is forced to take a construction gig.
In 1866, a Texas Ranger investigates some suspicious deaths in a town ruled by a religious despot whose past contains a disturbing link to his own.
"Rolling Stone" reporter David Lipsky shadows famed writer David Foster Wallace in this fictionalized account of their revealing five-day encounter.
After a string of defeats, a boxer rediscovers his fighting will with help from his trainer and half-brother, a once-talented pugilist.

Movie_Title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
description: When a young computer hacker is tasked with investigating a prying journalist, their separate missions become entangled amid a decades-old conspiracy.
Savage civil war and a dispute over humanitarian assistance threaten to unravel a checkered romance between an aid director and a doctor.
A violent confrontation between a motorcycle-riding bank robber and a rookie cop spirals into a tense generational feud.
A New Orleans politician finds his idealistic plans for rebuilding after a toxic oil spill unraveling thanks to a sex scandal.
When a move to an exclusive seaside community sends her mother and twin brother into a downward spiral, teenager Medina finds solace in surfing.
When a drug kingpin looking to go legit falls for a Philadelphia college student, it doesn't take long for his dangerous world to bleed into her life.
When he is blacklisted by Hollywood for his leftist political views, screenwriter Dalton Trumbo struggles to find work in secret as a ghost writer.
In rural Louisiana, a terse loner forges a redemptive bond with a woman he saved from a killer, but a violent past soon catches up with both of them.
An unhappy father and lawyer quits his suburban life and vanishes into the attic above his garage, where he watches his family move on without him.
A trio of brothers cope with their parents' volatile relationship by running wild and unchecked, and one of them experiences a visceral awakening.
A lecherous World Bank official sees his reputation crumbling when he's accused of raping a hotel maid during a trip to New York.
In this unflinching noir drama, a resilient teen goes on the trail of her missing, drug-dealing father when his absence threatens the family's safety.
A promising high school basketball player has his eye on an Ivy League scholarship. But his father's secret addictions could ruin everything.
A nerdy teen tries to make himself cool by association when he convinces a popular cheerleader to pose as his girlfriend.
Musician Dewey Finn gets a job as a fourth-grade substitute teacher, where he secretly begins teaching his students the finer points of rock 'n' roll.
A newly single mom takes in three young male filmmakers as boarders, but her estranged husband returns to complicate her new, unconventional life.
Holly and Eric discover reciprocal hatred during their first date, but must put their feelings aside after becoming guardians of their friends' baby.
Bryce and Juli first meet as children, with Juli having a crush on Bryce. As they mature, it appears their bond may blossom into something more.
Still-grieving widow Marnie moves to Los Angeles to be close to daughter Lori, but soon discovers new outlets for her maternal and romantic needs.
After losing their high-paying corporate jobs, an upwardly mobile couple turns to robbing banks to maintain their standard of living.
When two college roommates develop a discreet hookup app, casual affairs – and complications – soon run rampant on campus.
After a bitter divorce, a loan officer falls under the sway of a self-help guru who urges him to say yes to everything that comes his way for a year.

Movie_Title: To All The Boys: Always And Forever
description: Senior year of high school takes center stage as Lara Jean returns from a family trip to Korea and considers her college plans — with and without Peter.
A washed-up, former soccer star attempts to rebuild his relationship with his son and ex-wife by coaching his son's soccer team.
With his carefree lifestyle on the line, a wealthy charmer poses as a ranch hand to get a hardworking farmer to sell her family’s land before Christmas.
A group of down-on-their-luck Broadway stars shake up a small Indiana town as they rally behind a teen who just wants to attend prom with her girlfriend.
Three gutsy kids from a rapidly gentrifying Bronx neighborhood stumble upon a sinister plot to suck all the life from their beloved community.
Sparks fly when a crusading but cash-strapped attorney takes on a charming client looking to sue a dating site that guarantees its users will find love.
A single middle-aged woman who has lived her whole life in a small Virginia mining town uncovers a family secret that alters her profoundly.

Movie_Title: Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt: Kimmy vs. the Reverend
description: It's an interactive Kimmy special! Kimmy's getting married, but first she has to foil the Reverend's evil plot. It's your move: What should she do next?
When smart but cash-strapped teen Ellie Chu agrees to write a love letter for a jock, she doesn't expect to become his friend — or fall for his crush.
A suburban dad having a midlife crisis throws a lavish 40th birthday party to celebrate his punk-rock past but discovers it's not easy going back.
After shattering losses, a recent divorcée and a heartbroken widower restore their lives when they partner for a dance competition to save her studio.
When Ana, an influencer, crashes her car while talking on the phone, she’s shipped to her grumpy grandfather's farm – and forced into a digital detox.
A rookie lawyer with an emasculating past in baseball can break into the legal world only if he manages a law firm's ragtag company softball team.
A snowstorm hits a small town on a cold Christmas Eve, affecting the friendships, love lives and futures of several high school seniors.
When actor David Harbour finds lost footage of his father's disastrous televised stage play of a literary classic, he uncovers shocking family secrets.
After failing out of art school and taking a humdrum office job, a whimsical painter gets a chance to fulfill her lifelong dream of adopting a unicorn.
A couple finds unexpected drama when, after 40 years of living in the same Brooklyn walk-up, they attempt to sell their apartment and buy a new one.
To prove a point about measuring up and fitting in, Texas teen Willowdean Dickson enters a local pageant run by her ex-beauty queen mom.
A wrong-number text sparks a virtual romance between a smart but unpopular teen and a sweet jock who thinks he's talking to a gorgeous cheerleader.
In the probing documentary "Party Monster," DJ Fingablast investigates what became of his childhood hero, DJ Slizzard.

Movie_Title: To All the Boys I’ve Loved Before
description: When her secret love letters somehow get mailed to each of her five crushes, Lara Jean finds her quiet high school existence turned upside down.
With her Harvard Law dreams on the line, a black sorority leader agrees to help a rhythmically challenged sisterhood win a step dance championship.
Determined to make it big in America, Polish-born bandleader Jan Lewan draws his fans into a Ponzi scheme in this comedy based on a true story.
After being dumped on New Year's Eve, Bill pursues his ex-girlfriend to an off-season Gulf Coast beach town, but things get complicated along the way.
A man's drunken romp in a gorilla suit gets him mistaken for Bigfoot, drawing media attention and tourist dollars to his struggling small town.
When nerdy high schooler Dani finally attracts the interest of her longtime crush, she lands in the cross hairs of his ex, a social media celebrity.
After failing to strike a truce with their school's queen bee, two misfit best friends lead a nerd uprising that turns social hierarchy on its head.
With their mother in jail and bills piling up, ambitious small-town teens Deidra and Laney plot a series of train robberies to keep themselves afloat.
Bill Murray rounds up an all-star cast for an evening of music, mischief and barroom camaraderie in this irreverent twist on holiday variety shows.
A young mechanic comes out to his extremely straight best friends. Once they get used to the idea, they're determined to help him find the right guy.
Never married but always at weddings, a copy editor finally dives into the dating pool but wonders if her love story involves staying single forever.
When a broken ATM dishes out a fortune, a couple who works at the bank vies to see who can recover the most cash – and the loser must find a new job.
To escape the stress of fame, teen pop star Jordan goes incognito in a small town, where he forms a special bond with high school art student Emily.
When cheerleading champs the Rebels are challenged by an edgy new squad, they take on teams from all over the world in a virtual cheer battle.
A career woman who has everything but romance finds her values challenged when she starts dating a good man she met on a Christian matchmaking site.
As his father takes steps to move on, a New Yorker grieving his mom's death visits Los Angeles where new possibilities may bring him out of his funk.

Movie_Title: Don Quixote: The Ingenious Gentleman of La Mancha
director: Mahin Ibrahim, Austin Kolodney, Will Lowell, David Beier, Dave Dorsey, Xu Zhang, Alana Waksman, Jon YonKondy, Drue Metz, Brandon Somerhalder
description: In this modern adaptation of a Spanish classic, an eccentric, elderly gentleman sets out with his honest sidekick to right the wrongs of the world.
A questionable character working as a self-styled "biblical archaeologist" advances his cause by creating phony religious artifacts.
Warehouse workers Vince and Zack compete in a full-on war to be named Employee of the Month and win a date with their dream girl.
When James's living situation turns sour, he has little choice but to move in with his new girlfriend – a decision he almost immediately regrets.
Following a night of hard partying that left their tycoon boss dead, four women try to keep it a secret in hopes of closing a billion-dollar deal.
Unaware they’ve matched online, a struggling writer embellishes his lifestyle to impress a successful exec with whom he sparks an unexpected romance.
Tired of dealing with boyfriends who wrong them, gal pals Lauren, Emily and Andrea decide to turn the tables and become the players themselves.
Andy Samberg stars in this comedy as an accident-prone daredevil who's determined to jump 15 buses on his moped and impress his abusive stepfather.

Movie_Title: I Don't Know How She Does It
description: In this affable yuppie comedy, Kate Reddy is a successful executive, wife and mom whose personal and professional lives hang in precarious balance.

Movie_Title: I'll See You in My Dreams
description: After the passing of her dog, a long-widowed senior citizen is in need of companionship. Two very different possibilities present themselves.
Five viral Internet celebrities travel to a competition that will award one of them their own television series in this ensemble comedy.
After a whirlwind romance, a couple rushes to say "I do" at the bride's family estate on Martha's Vineyard, where their relations meet — and clash.
After she pushes her best friend Kort to date a handsome transfer student, college student Allie is left to tackle adulthood on her own.
A young woman's attempt to come out of the closet on Thanksgiving gets complicated when her male roommate shows up to her parents' home unannounced.
A former Goth studying to become a nun finds her faith tested when she returns home to visit her brother, who has been disfigured in the Iraq War.
A filmmaker working on a documentary about love in modern Manhattan becomes personally entangled in the romantic lives of his subjects.
When a self-help author learns that his mother has fallen for his sadistic high school gym teacher, he tries to put a stop to their budding romance.
A mild-mannered office drone plucks a Halloween party invitation off the street and suddenly finds himself the main event at a "murder party."

Movie_Title: My Entire High School Sinking Into the Sea
description: After an earthquake sends their school building drifting into the sea, a group of high-schoolers struggles to survive and overcome clique wars.
When Sarah travels to California for her sister's wedding, she hears a rumor that her family was the real-life inspiration for "The Graduate."
As high school approaches, four best friends have a summer sleepover and participate in a scavenger hunt against their popular archrivals.
To keep his teen crush from spotting him in an embarrassing YouTube video, Anthony and his friend Ian must enter the virtual world and alter the clip.
Still sexy at 60, Harry Sanborn wines and dines women half his age. But a getaway with his girlfriend goes awry when her mother drops in unannounced.
Fed up with the hypocrisy of the adults around them, three creative high school misfits revive an old debate club as a way to fight back.
As a writer ponders how to kill off her main character, the man begins hearing her voice in his head and realizes that his days are numbered.
Two terminally ill men bust out of the cancer ward with a plan to experience life to the fullest before they kick the bucket.
After developing an "infidelity formula" said to repel cheating, a popular blogger crosses paths with a charming lawyer willing to put it to the test.
A young priest’s faith is tested when he finds himself attracted to a woman he meets at confession and his ideals are shaken to the core.
Six book club members find their lives resemble a modern-day version of Jane Austen's novels in this drama.
When an 11-year-old girl becomes Pop Warner football's first female quarterback, she raises eyebrows – till she takes her team to the brink of glory.
A hardworking Wisconsin college student falls for her arrogant yet charming classmate, unaware that he's a Danish prince attending school incognito.
It's 1979, and engineer Sami is excited to leave his Indian village for a job in Chicago. But he soon runs into problems achieving his American dream.
Widower Martin is a restaurateur with a booming business and three headstrong daughters who leave the house to pursue their individual destinies.
A disbanded fraternity tries to get their act together by finding new members, but beer bongs, bad grades and a demented dean stand in their way.
With an all-important high school party at stake, two teen yoga fanatics enlist a man hunter to help fight an army of monsters created by Nazis.
After stepping in to revitalize his family's hotel, a money-minded businessman clashes with the hotel's cheery, Christmas-loving decorator.
After reuniting as middle-aged men, three kung-fu prodigies must set their differences aside and dust off their skills to avenge their beloved mentor.
In the wake of the Civil War, Jesse James leads a feisty group of ranchers in a fight against a railroad baron bent on seizing their land at any cost.
In the year 3000, an alien race known as the Psychlos devastate planet Earth and force the surviving human population into slavery.
A recovering alcoholic is skeptical of his son's claim that his new stepfather is a killer – but soon begins to sense the boy is telling the truth.
In this indie thriller, a foreign exchange student moves in with her roommate's family who grieves over the daughter they would do anything to get back.
Stars of Netflix's "Shadow and Bone" discuss the show's epic combat scenes, answer some fan questions and play an "Army vs. Crows" trivia game.
After dating a charming cop who turns into an obsessive stalker, a small-town girl must save herself from his deadly ways.
A family moves into a new home, where their son falls into a coma and eerie events begin to reveal something far more sinister is lurking in the house.

Movie_Title: Nate Bargatze: The Greatest Average American
description: Nate Bargatze touches on Zoom comedy shows, losing his phone, hotel breakfast fails, animal caddies, new math and much more in this special.
Comedian Gabriel Iglesias takes the stage in San Jose, California, for a stand-up performance featuring wild stories and even wilder impersonations.
Brian Regan tackles the big issues weighing on him, including aging, time, obsessive behavior, backpacks on airplanes, ungrateful horses and raisins.
A lighthearted bonding opportunity takes a dark and decidedly dangerous turn when a father and daughter try out an escape room in a small town.
A former violinist grows suspicious of the new people in her life and their alarming behavior as she recovers from an assault that left her blind.
An alien ordered to colonize Earth abandons his mission when he hears music for the first time and is determined to save his adopted planet.

Movie_Title: Larry the Cable Guy: Remain Seated
description: With his signature call to "Git-R-Done," Larry muses on swampy weather, late-night shopping at Walmart and other raunchy tales of life in rural America.
When an unfulfilled country music star hides out in his hometown, he meets a budding interior designer who finds her way into his heart.
An unlucky woman finds a solution for her hateful ex, a trying job hunt and a stalker through a charming P.I. – only to endure a new set of problems.
On prom night, a high school senior still struggling with her nightmare past tries to evade a killer bent on ending the party for her and her friends.
What do you do if your parents are kidnapped by a crew of international thieves? You begin a wild overnight adventure — complete with spy gear.
In the 18th century, apprentice exorcist Tom Ward is the lynchpin in a battle between good and evil when imprisoned witch Mother Malkin escapes.
A lawyer is caught in a terrifying game of cat and mouse when a drink with an old friend escalates into an obsession that jeopardizes everyone she loves.
After bringing home a set of mysterious stones from the Grand Canyon, a boy unleashes an ancient force that begins to terrorize his family.

Movie_Title: Ben Platt Live from Radio City Music Hall
description: Backed by a full band and a ready wit, actor Ben Platt opens up a very personal songbook onstage —numbers from his debut LP, "Sing to Me Instead.”
Jerry Seinfeld takes the stage in New York and tackles talking vs. texting, bad buffets vs. so-called "great" restaurants and the magic of Pop Tarts.
On this painfully honest but hilarious journey, Birbiglia struggles to find reason in an area where it may be impossible to find: love.
When a self-help writer's advice goes wrong, she finds herself in the crosshairs of an obsessive young woman with a thirst for vengeance.
Comedian Tom Papa takes on body image issues, social media, pets, Staten Island, the "old days" and more in a special from his home state of New Jersey.
A group of uber-popular, social media influencers’ trip to a digital media festival grows dark when an evil spirit wants to lure them to their demise.
A woman shipwrecked on a remote island discovers she’s not alone and begins a fight for survival against a deadly presence that emerges each night.

Movie_Title: 100 Things to do Before High School
description: Led by seventh-grader C.J., three students who have been warned about the dangers of high school decide to make the best of their middle-school years.
A dying tycoon has his consciousness transplanted into the body of a healthy young man, only to make a troubling discovery about the body's origin.
Viral video star Miranda Sings and her real-world alter ego Colleen Ballinger share the stage in a special packed with music, comedy and "magichinry."
Fifteen years after a traumatic crime, a woman is released from psychiatric care and tries to drive out an evil spirit that continues to haunt her.
Comic Nate Bargatze touches on air travel, cheap weddings, college football, chocolate milk and the perils of ordering coffee in this stand-up special.
When a young man becomes possessed after playing a Ouija game, a ghost hunter investigates the evil spirit dwelling within him.

Movie_Title: Kevin James: Sweat the Small Stuff
description: The film and television star riffs on life's many royal pains in this hourlong special taped at New York City's Hudson Theatre in 2001.
When Superman and the other Justice League superheroes start disappearing, it's up to Batman to unravel the caper and save the day.

Movie_Title: Tom Papa Live in New York City
description: Comedian Tom Papa riffs on the trials of married life, fatherhood in the 21st century, domestic pets and more in his stand-up show.
The Scorpion King joins forces with a Nubian princess in an all-or-nothing fight to stop a warlord from claiming the souls of the vanquished.
Two teenagers step into a secret closet and emerge in a terrifying alternate reality. They must find their way back before the door shuts forever.

Movie_Title: The Legacy of a Whitetail Deer Hunter
description: A star of hunting videos strives to bond with his 12-year-old son on a wilderness trip but learns familial connections can't be forced.

Movie_Title: Steve Martin and Martin Short: An Evening You Will Forget for the Rest of Your Life
description: Longtime pals and showbiz icons Steve Martin and Martin Short share countless quips, catchy tunes and hilarious stories about their lives in comedy.

Movie_Title: Tig Notaro Happy To Be Here
description: Comedian Tig Notaro unleashes her inner prankster in a playful stand-up special packed with funny anecdotes, parenting confessions and more.
Pocoyo and his friends have a costume contest to celebrate Halloween and learn new things about planets and stars in space.

Movie_Title: Kevin James: Never Don't Give Up
description: Kevin James makes his long-awaited return to stand-up in this family-friendly special, dishing on fatherhood, fans, his disdain for allergies and more.
In his first English-language special, comedian Gad Elmaleh gleefully digs into America's food obsessions, dating culture, slang and more.
Orbiting above a planet on the brink of war, scientists test a device to solve an energy crisis and end up face-to-face with a dark alternate reality.

Movie_Title: Harith Iskander: I Told You So
description: Malaysian stand-up comedy icon Harith Iskander takes the stage in Kuala Lumpur to talk about Singapore, a past girlfriend, Rick Astley and more.
Still mourning the death of their son, Mark and Jessie welcome foster child Cody into their lives. Soon they discover he has a strange ability.

Movie_Title: Barbra: The Music ... The Mem'ries ... The Magic!
description: Iconic songstress Barbra Streisand culminates her 13-city tour in Miami with dazzling ballads, Broadway standards and stories from behind the scenes.
Brian Regan takes relatable family humor to new heights as he talks board games, underwear elastic and looking for hot dogs in all the wrong places.
Jerry Seinfeld returns to the club that gave him his start in the 1970s, mixing iconic jokes with stories from his childhood and early days in comedy.
Small-town import Ryan Hamilton charms New York with folksy comic observations on big-city life, hot-air ballooning and going to Disney World alone.
A Viennese child who was kidnapped and held captive in a basement before escaping after eight years reveals her headline-making story of survival.

Movie_Title: Trevor Noah: Afraid of the Dark
description: The "Daily Show" host ponders the perils of naming countries, how traffic lights turn New Yorkers invincible and why you shouldn't drink in Scotland.
America's king of clean comedy delivers wickedly funny jokes in his fifth hour-long special.

Movie_Title: Gabriel lglesias: I’m Sorry For What I Said When I Was Hungry
description: Hawaiian-shirt enthusiast Gabriel "Fluffy" Iglesias finds the laughs in racist gift baskets, Prius-driving cops and all-female taco trucks.

Movie_Title: True Memoirs of an International Assassin
description: After his publisher markets his crime novel as a memoir, a novice author finds himself forcibly recruited into a deadly political plot in Venezuela.

Movie_Title: Jeff Foxworthy and Larry the Cable Guy: We’ve Been Thinking...
description: Grammy-nominated comedians Jeff Foxworthy and Larry the Cable Guy bring their distinctive brand of humor to a packed crowd in Minneapolis.
Comedian Jim Gaffigan cuts loose on a variety of topics, including Hot Pockets, holidays, Catholicism and his favorite activity: doing nothing.
Jim Gaffigan offers up his take on bacon, bowling and other weighty topics in this stand-up performance filmed live in Austin on his 2008 comedy tour.
Funnyman Jim Gaffigan offers up his unique take on everything from Disney World to overweight whales in this live show from Washington, D.C.
Comic Jim Gaffigan delivers his sardonic take on topics like eating, exercise, weddings and his five kids in this live stand-up special.
The actress, comedian and YouTube sensation riffs on everything from nail salons and Gypsies to Mexican moms and super-sleuthing Liam Neeson.
Aiming to hasten an uprising, the leader of an underground rebellion dispatches acrobatic assassin Aeon Flux to eliminate the government's top leader.
Fierce mammoth hunter D'Leh sets out on an impossible journey to rescue the woman he loves from a vicious warlord and save the people of his village.
Young parents-to-be Claire and Ryan move into a suburban rental home, unaware that someone is secretly watching their every move via hidden cameras.

Movie_Title: A Haunting at Silver Falls: The Return
description: When the ghost of her serial killer aunt seemingly resurfaces, Jordan must return to Silver Falls in hopes of finally putting an end to the torment.
Young motocross racer Miles Hill helps a top-secret robotic combat dog evade its ruthless creator and the military, who are in hot pursuit.
Recast as modern-day men, Tom Sawyer and Huck Finn draft their misfit cronies to help find the buried treasure the two have sought since boyhood.
A girl raised to be a government assassin just wants to be a normal teen – so she runs away and pretends to be a high school exchange student.
The musings of comedian Bill Burr are let loose in this special, which was filmed at the historic Fillmore Auditorium in San Francisco.
Menaced by a psychopath who's got the local cops scared, waitress Lillian turns to a mysterious old logger to help her turn the tables on her stalker.
A mild-mannered janitor duped into believing he's an undercover agent stumbles into an international arms ring plot involving the CIA and the FBI.
In a tailspin after her marriage collapses, Jamie falls for a helpful gentleman whose interest in her welfare hides sinister motives.
An intelligent but intense honor student traumatizes his high school teacher and mentor when he doesn't get the grade he believes he deserves.
When an aspiring knight crosses paths with a dragon, the two form an unlikely alliance in a high-stakes battle against a malicious sorcerer.
This sequel introduces Draco the dragon's offspring, Drake, who dreams of becoming a knight and teams up with a stable boy to master his skills.
Mistakenly accused of kidnapping, a veteran soldier leaves a trail of broken bad guys in his wake as he tries to rescue a teen sex trafficking victim.
When a successful young rap star has an affair with an obsessive fan, his life is turned upside down when she kidnaps him.

director: Shinji Aramaki, Mamoru Oshii, Hideki Futamura, Toshiyuki Kanno, Tomoki Kyoda, Koichi Mashimo, Yasushi Muraki, Daisuke Nishio, Frank O'Connor, Koji Sawai, Joseph Chou, Hiroshi Yamazaki
description: This anthology features seven independent anime shorts from renowned directors, delving into the futuristic universe of the video game franchise Halo.
Witness the origins of Master Chief and the Spartan program as a group of children transform into enhanced soldiers and fight a powerful alien threat.
This action-packed animated double feature pits the Hulk against two of the Marvel Universe's most powerful characters: Wolverine and Thor.
"Last Comic Standing" winner Iliza Shlesinger unleashes her acerbic, stream-of-conscious comedy on an unsuspecting audience in her hometown of Dallas.
Outspoken comedian Katt Williams pokes fun at a variety of topics, including sex, relationships, parenthood and trying to make it as an entertainer.

A wealthy, despicable businessman comes to the realization that he may lose half his fortune to the obnoxious wife he's trying to divorce. So, he decides to arrange his own kidnapping in order to wipe himself out and claim poverty.
Opting to stay on campus over the Thanksgiving holiday, coed Justine and a handful of friends find their break violently disrupted by a sadistic gang.
When an apartment building manager discovers a water nymph in the complex's swimming pool, he tries to help her return to her mythical home.
An ex-CIA contractor turned thief is forced to head a CIA gambit to infiltrate a black ops Mexican prison and steal $50 million in drug cartel money.
With transport support from their magic car, Axel, the LeapFrog pets make a new friend named Max, who helps them learn counting skills in Numberland.
Scout takes a magical trip to a farm where an alligator and other friendly critters teach him all about sounding out the letters of the alphabet.
This made-for-TV drama chronicles the scandal and enduring mystery surrounding Lizzie Borden, who was tried in 1892 for axing her parents to death.

Movie_Title: Marvel's Iron Man & Hulk: Heroes United
description: When scientists join Hulk's gamma energy with Tony Stark's Arc Reactor, the resulting force creates a foe that only the two Marvel heroes can combat.
With their divorce set to become final on Christmas day, a couple must decide if they're really ready to throw in the towel on their relationship.
With access to the scientists and engineers responsible for the Curiosity rover's on-the-ground experiments, NOVA captures its landing on Mars.

Movie_Title: Power Rangers Samurai: Christmas Together, Friends Forever (Christmas Special)
description: On Christmas Eve, as the teens at Shiba House reflect on their first year together, they get an unexpected lesson on the true spirit of the holidays.

Movie_Title: Power Rangers Samurai: Party Monsters (Halloween Special)
description: On Halloween night, the creepiest creatures from the Netherworld trade war stories about their battles with the Samurai Power Rangers.

Movie_Title: Power Rangers Super Megaforce: The Legendary Battle (Extended)
description: New footage augments the tale of the Rangers, who give their all to save Earth from Vrak and Emperor Mavro, as the Armada stages an epic final attack.

Movie_Title: Power Rangers Super Samurai: Trickster Treat
description: When a Nighlok invades the Samurai Rangers' dreams and turns them into nightmares, the Rangers must figure out what is reality and what is illusion.
Held hostage by men searching for a secret her late husband left behind, a recent widow and her family race against time to find a way out.
Global comedy star Russell Peters leaves no ethnic or cultural stereotype unsatirized in this outrageous standup appearance in Sydney, Australia.
A weekend of beach-house debauchery turns into a nightmare for a group of friends when they discover that the waters are infested with vicious sharks.
In this first full Shopkins movie, Peppa-Mint is the new Shoppie in town who stirs things up by hosting a team cooking competition.

Movie_Title: Solo: A Star Wars Story (Spanish Version)
description: A young Han Solo tries to settle an old score with the help of his new buddy Chewbacca, a crew of space smugglers and a cunning old friend.
After a popular morning television host bumps into an old acquaintance with a dark past, her professional and personal lives begin to unravel.

Movie_Title: Star Wars: Episode VIII: The Last Jedi
description: As the remnants of the Resistance flee Kylo Ren and the First Order, Rey seeks out Luke Skywalker – but he wants nothing more to do with the Force.
Bounty hunter Milo Boyd finds his latest assignment downright satisfying as he learns that the bail-jumper he must chase down is his ex-wife, Nicole.
Five high school students serving Saturday detention in a former corrections facility must find a way to outsmart an unseen menace out to kill them.
A troubled teenage girl hopes to start fresh at a new school, but the horrifying truth about her past is destined to catch up with her.
After years of limited contact with Earth, an inquisitive teen who lives on Mars makes an interplanetary trek to discover his own origins.
When a law professor fails an ambitious student for academic dishonesty, he goes to terrifying lengths to seek revenge for more than just his grade.
A disparate group of teenage girls discovers how to obtain supernatural abilities, but abusing their newfound power has disturbing consequences.

Movie_Title: Tremors 6: A Cold Day in Hell
description: The subterranean, worm-like creatures are back, and Graboid-hunter Burt Gummer suspects they've been weaponized.
Six fearless surfers travel to the north coast of Iceland to ride waves unlike anything they've ever experienced, captured with high-tech cameras.
A divorced professor shares a night of passion with a troubled student who quickly develops an unhealthy – perhaps deadly – infatuation.
A notorious underground rush-seeker deemed untouchable by the law is coerced into cooperating with the government to infiltrate a Russian crime ring.
In this action-packed follow-up to XXX, U.S. intelligence officer Augustus Gibbons must thwart a massive conspiracy to overthrow the government.
This biopic of Thurgood Marshall, the first Black U.S. Supreme Court justice, centers on his pivotal work in a sensational case as an NAACP lawyer.

Movie_Title: Same Kind of Different as Me
description: A wealthy couple whose marriage is on the rocks befriends a local homeless man who changes their perspectives in this inspiring true story.
A spirited exchange student and an American man fall in love in LA. But their romance faces an uphill battle when she is forced to return to England.
An FBI agent makes it his mission to put cunning con man Frank Abagnale Jr. behind bars. But Frank not only eludes capture, he revels in the pursuit.
An ungainly-looking colt becomes a winning thoroughbred in this Depression-era drama based on the true story of champion racehorse Seabiscuit.

Movie_Title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn: Part 1
description: After a dream wedding, Bella and Edward enter a new nightmare when a shocking development forces life-or-death decisions.

Movie_Title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn: Part 2
description: In the epic series' final chapter, Bella and Edward's newborn daughter forces the couple into a life-altering confrontation with the Volturi.
Weighed down by a dark secret, IRS agent Ben Thomas tries to improve the lives of seven strangers in need of a second chance.
Caught up in the lowrider world of his father and embittered brother, an East LA graffiti artist grapples with a family feud while chasing his dreams.
When the legal system declares him unfit to be a parent, a father with an intellectual disability fights to regain custody of his young daughter.
When a cantankerous trainer mentors a persistent amateur boxer determined to go pro, deep-seated emotions become their strongest opponents.
Neighbors but by no means friends, high schoolers Yolanda and Mari discover a bond and an attraction when they're made study partners.
A widowed lawyer struggles to retain custody of his biracial granddaughter when the girl's paternal grandmother questions his competence.
In 1960, Israeli spies undertake a daring mission to capture notorious Nazi war criminal Adolf Eichmann and bring him to justice. Based on real events.
A teenage equestrian and a local football player fall for each other, but simmering racism in their small town puts their relationship to the test.
When his wife becomes a murder suspect and is sent to prison, a professor plots a meticulous plan to take back her freedom and reunite his family.
When the women at a radium factory begin to fall gravely and inexplicably ill, Bessie and her co-workers set out to expose a corporate cover-up.
After running away from her abusive mother, a streetwise teen seeks refuge with her father, but he rejects her when he learns that she's pregnant.
Animation and activism unite in this multimedia spoken-word response to police brutality and racial injustice.
With the world's economy in dire straits, corporate protagonist Dagny Taggart searches for a solution amid the rubble of a long-abandoned factory.
The life of a White House butler who worked for eight presidents unfolds against a backdrop of unparalleled change in American history.

Movie_Title: If Anything Happens I Love You
description: Grieving parents journey through an emotional void as they mourn the loss of a child in the aftermath of a tragic school shooting.
