A master criminal engineers his own shooting during a police raid, then refuses treatment while awaiting rescue in a tense standoff at a hospital.
When Pakistani authorities learn of a looming terrorist strike, they ask a retired intelligence officer to counter the attack before it's too late.
Through songs and puns, comedian Lokillo Florez hilariously reviews how Latin Americans have adjusted to a new world where no-hugging policies prevail.
Mexican comedian Alan Saldańa is back, poking gentle fun at himself and parceling advice, especially about how to stay married and how to be parents.
The delightful Argentine comic Agustín Aristarán (aka Soy Rada) is back, this time putting the spotlight on family and parenting, magic and music.
South African comedian Loyiso Gola serves up filter-free humor as he riffs about race, identity, politics, and a school prank gone embarrassingly wrong!
The comics of RebellComedy take the stage and tackle mistaken identities, geriatric influencers, our flawed perceptions of animals and more.
From his hometown of Málaga, Dani Rovira reflects on human beings’ nonsensical hatred in this hilarious and unfiltered comedy special.

Movie_Title: Blanche Gardin: I talk to myself
description: Touching on bulimia, death and cat sodomy, this French actress and comedian is keen to push the envelope in a one-woman show with understated flair.

Movie_Title: Rhys Nicholson Live at the Athenaeum
description: Rhys Nicholson flexes his biting humor as he discusses horse tranquilizers, angry letters from viewers, and more in this stand-up special.
In this English-language special, Icelandic comedian Ari Eldjárn pokes fun at Nordic rivalries, Hollywood's take on Thor, the whims of toddlers and more.
In this stand-up special, comedian Hazel Brugger offers her breezy takes on unruly geese, chatty gynecologists, German bank loans and more.
Felix Lobrecht aims his dark humor at overly polite culture, weird laughter, the sheer awkwardness of a walking baby and more in this stand-up special.
Charming comic Michael McIntyre talks family, technology, sharks, accents and the time he confused himself for a world leader in this stand-up special.
Brazilian comedian Afonso Padilha dives into his humble beginnings and digs out hilarious stories about his childhood in this very personal set.
Jack Whitehall hits the stage with hilarious tales about happy couples, life in hotels, human stupidity and his well-traveled father.
Stand-up comedian Urzila Carlson keeps the crowd roaring with her thoughts on recasting "The Biggest Loser," sex tape regrets and boxed wine hangovers.
In a rollicking special, Thiago Ventura jokes about life in the hood, social issues and more, explaining how actions speak louder than words.
Hannah Gadsby returns for her second special and digs deep into the complexities of popularity, identity and her most unusual dog park encounter.
Comedian Maurício Meirelles explores his chaotic mind with scathingly funny views on family, prejudices, turtles and more in this stand-up special.
Swedish comedian David Batra gets personal as he playfully details the perks and pitfalls of being married to a recently resigned political leader.

Movie_Title: Alex Fernández: The Best Comedian in the World
description: Comic Alex Fernández performs his familiar autobiographical stories but goes a little deeper this time with a tender tale about one of his six siblings.

Movie_Title: Jack Whitehall: Christmas with My Father
description: Jack Whitehall invites his notoriously stuffy father onstage in London's West End for a Christmas comedy extravaganza, complete with celebrity guests.

Movie_Title: Fadily Camara : La plus drôle de tes copines
description: Irrepressible French comedian Fadily Camara weaves jokes, vivid characters and physical comedy into a lively stand-up show at La Cigale in Paris.
Argentine comedian Grego Rossello takes the stage in Buenos Aires to share his takes on modern stardom, airline dining, brotherly love and more.
Korea’s beloved comedian and favorite big sister figure talks sex, relationships and celebrity life. And she’s sassier and dirtier than ever before.
Comedian Mo Gilligan blends smooth moves and sharp humor as he riffs on humble beginnings, family dynamics and the complex art of dancing in the club.
Honest, introspective comic Simon Amstell digs deep and delivers a uniquely vulnerable stand-up set on love, ego, intimacy and ayahuasca.
Brazilian YouTube sensation Whindersson Nunes revisits his humble beginnings and much more in a series of playful stories and peculiar songs.
In his second stand-up special, Daniel Sosa reminisces about his childhood, ponders Mexican traditions and points out a major problem with "Coco."
Italian comic and satirist Saverio Raimondo regales a Milan crowd with tales of online antics, awkward injuries and white-knuckle flights.
Comedian Franco Escamilla shares stories about parenting his children when they get into trouble, with reflections on gender, friendship and romance.

Movie_Title: Francesco De Carlo: Cose di Questo Mondo
description: Taking the stage in Milan, Francesco De Carlo opens up about his bad habits, religion, politics and what he's learned from traveling the world.
Italian comedian Edoardo Ferrario riffs on life at 30 and unpacks the peculiarities of global travel, social media and people who like craft beer.
Standup comedian and "Daily Show" correspondent Gina Yashere delivers a sharp set of wry observations on the environment, money and more.

Movie_Title: Edmilson Filho: Notas, Comedy about Relationships
description: Brazilian comedian Edmilson Filho walks his audience through the stages of a modern relationship, playing up the differences between men and women.
An off-color joke nearly cost him everything. Brazilian comic Rafinha Bastos talks about that and much more, from his divorce to finding love again.
Daring comedian Yoo Byung-jae connects criticism he's received from the general public to some of the most touchy issues in current Korean society.

Movie_Title: Coco y Raulito: Carrusel de ternura
description: A study in contrasts, comedy partners and good friends Coco Celis and Raúl Meneses alternate separate stand-up sets for double the laughs.

Movie_Title: Jani Dueńas: Grandes fracasos de ayer y hoy
description: Chilean comedian and personality Jani Dueńas pours out her feelings on issues that are all too universal, from aging to dieting to sex.
Australian comic Hannah Gadsby reshapes standard stand-up by pairing punchlines with personal revelations on gender, sexuality and childhood turmoil.
Mexican stand-up comedian Franco Escamilla draws his jokes from real-life experiences – and he's willing to do anything for new material.
Argentine actor and comedian Fernando Sanjiao uses humor and impersonations to explore the concepts of masculinity and fatherhood in modern times.
Mexican comic Carlos Ballarta mocks himself and points out the absurdities of parenthood and how he uses his wife's pregnancies to avoid commitments.

Movie_Title: Dany Boon: Des Hauts De France
description: In an eclectic one-man show, French superstar Dany Boon reflects on his homeland, his first comedy gig and the challenges of parenting hostile teens.
Live from Hamburg, Iranian-German comedian Enissa Amani shares her take on German engineering, tax deductions and online fan-mail etiquette.
British comedian Greg Davies revisits terrifying dates, manscaping disasters, his father's pranks and more in a savagely funny stand-up special.

Movie_Title: Todo lo que sería Lucas Lauriente
description: In his stand-up set, Argentine comic Lucas Lauriente animatedly rattles off reflections on different generations and begs kids to stop saying "goals."
Armed with sly wit, a fresh outlook and plenty of style, French comedy star Fary veers from dating to stereotypes and beyond in this exclusive special.

Movie_Title: Sofía Nińo de Rivera: Selección Natural
description: Mexico's Sofía Nińo de Rivera brings her dark humor to the stage with jokes about marriage traps, sexually attractive leopards and funny funerals.
In his first special in seven years, Ricky Gervais slings his trademark snark at celebrity, mortality and a society that takes everything personally.
An Argentine comedian espouses the values of feminism, speaking on topics like sex, language, abortion and why it's OK to let a man buy you dinner.
A Chilean comedian fuses activism with irreverence for a stand-up set filled with jokes about misogyny, reproductive rights and respecting women.
Argentine comedian Agustín "Radagast" Aristarán adds doses of magic, music and acting to his high-energy stand-up routine.
Stand-up comic Fakkah Fuzz mines cross-cultural humor from the experience of growing up as an outspoken Malay man in Singapore.

Movie_Title: Mau Nieto: Viviendo sobrio… desde el bar
description: Performing at a bar, Mexican stand-up comedian Mau Nieto dishes on his modest upbringing, his failed relationships and his attempts to stay sober.
Argentine comedian Sebastián Wainraich highlights the comedy in everyday life, from minibars to reasons why funerals are better than weddings.
Droll comic Ricardo Quevedo hits Bogotá with a set that touches on embarrassing misunderstandings, sex talk, the thrill of being scared and more.

Movie_Title: Arango y Sanint: Ríase el show
description: Colombian stand-up comedians Antonio Sanint and Julián Arango impersonate an Argentine visitor and a cabbie, and a pair of dirty old men at the opera.

Movie_Title: Alejandro Riańo: Especial de stand up
description: Colombian comedian Alejandro Riańo discusses the perks of dating a she-wolf, styles of dancing, the quirks of Bogotá men and soccer game announcers.
Self-deprecating comic Russell Howard plows ahead through politics, porn, social media and his own shortcomings. Yet he somehow keeps it positive.
Raw and outspoken, comedian Alexis de Anda bares her soul about weddings, exercise, sex, gynecologists, drugs and much more in this stand-up special.
Comedian Jack Whitehall takes the stage to tell stories about drinking, drugs, a Google Maps van and his ongoing rivalry with Robert Pattinson.

Movie_Title: El Especial de Alex Fernández, el Especial
description: From a Mexico City theme park, energetic stand-up Alex Fernández riffs on music, cheap toys, insecurity and other fun things about growing up.

Movie_Title: Fabrizio Copano: Solo pienso en mi
description: Fabrizio Copano takes audience participation to the next level in this stand-up set while reflecting on sperm banks, family WhatsApp groups and more.

Movie_Title: Alan Saldańa: Mi vida de pobre
description: Mexican comic Alan Saldańa has fun with everything from the pressure of sitting in an exit row to maxing out his credit card in this stand-up special.
Comedian Hans Teeuwen rebels against political correctness, proclaims himself Britain's moral leader and takes on Donald Trump.
Eclectic character comedian Marco Luque plays himself in this stand-up special about relationships, regional differences and his own love of movies.
Eclectic stand-up comic Manu NNa relays everyday tales about the struggles of being gay in Mexico and shares his love of telenovelas and mezcal.

Movie_Title: Bridget Christie: Stand Up for Her
description: Performing stand-up for a packed house in London's Hoxton Hall, comedian Bridget Christie dives into the politics of gender, sex and equality.

Movie_Title: Felipe Neto: My Life Makes No Sense
description: YouTube sensation Felipe Neto brings the stories from his autobiographical book "Năo Faz Sentido!" to the stage in this comedy special.
Stand-up comic Katherine Ryan reminisces about unusual relationships, life in the hometown she hates and the time she enraged an entire nation.
Outspoken comedian Beppe Grillo reminisces about his long career, including the triumphs and controversies that fueled his rise in Italian politics.
Comedian Daniel Sosa inhabits various characters, including a Tupperware dealer, a thirsty priest and a Trojan horse soldier in this stand-up special.
French comic Gad Elmaleh regales a Montreal crowd with tales of awkward mix-ups and baffling customs he's encountered since moving to the U.S.
The expressive Ricardo O'Farrill uses his astute comedic sensibilities to tease Christmas traditions, and not even Santa Claus escapes unscathed.

Movie_Title: Carlos Ballarta: El amor es de putos
description: Carlos Ballarta mocks daily life in Mexico, including public transit, the education system and the corn seller who betrays your confidence.
The cerebral and popular German cabaret comic expounds his theories on gender norms, primal instincts and a decidedly gastrointestinal Big Bang.
Jandino Asporaat riffs on the challenges of raising kids and serenades the audience with a rousing rendition of "Sex on Fire" in his comedy show.
Self-deprecating comic Sofía Nińo de Rivera puts her sarcasm on full display in this stand-up special filmed live at Guadalajara's Degollado Theater.
British comedian Jimmy Carr unleashes his deadpan delivery and wickedly funny one-liners to a sold-out audience at the UK's Hammersmith Apollo.
Ricardo O'Farrill brings his sharp, observational humor to the stage with a relentless sarcasm and specific Mexican sensibility. Prepare for mockery.
Uma wakes up in a lush tropical facility designed to turn willful girls into perfect ladies. That’s bad enough, but its real purpose is even worse.
Two young artists, a violin player and an actress, fight to achieve their dreams and keep their relationship together during Christmastime.
After witnessing a haunting in their hospital, two doctors become dangerously obsessed with obtaining scientific proof that ghosts exist.
When a big-city family moves to a remote town, two young brothers and their new friends try to solve the menacing mystery that haunts their home.
Truth and illusion blurs when a homeless amnesiac awakens from an experimental medical procedure with the ability to see people's innermost traumas.
When their parents' marriage threatens to crumble, the teenage Salazar siblings plot to reconcile them before their 20th wedding anniversary.
In an abandoned hospital in Tainan, visitors seeking to communicate with their relatives' spirits are haunted by disturbing, supernatural occurrences.
After his compatriots are murdered by Russian gangsters, a hacker confesses the history of his elite, fame-seeking group to a Europol investigator.
Looking for a fresh start, a park ranger gets a new assignment. When he discovers a network of poachers, survival depends on his lethal instincts.
After a purification ritual unravels, a conflicted Taoist priest attempts to help a lonely young psychic whose aunt is possessed by a powerful demon.
A young reporter's investigation into a string of grisly suicides takes a dangerous detour when she follows the clues to a cursed stretch of road.
After a tragic turn of events at the new home he's fixing up, Daniel hears a ghostly plea for help, spurring him to seek out a famous paranormal expert.
In this horror movie, a retired priest haunted by his sins is pulled back into the darkness when a friend begs him to help his possessed daughter.

Movie_Title: Nobody Sleeps in the Woods Tonight
description: Addicted to technology, a group of teens attends a rehabilitation camp in the forest, but a sinister force there intends to take them offline forever.
When a former criminal psychiatrist discovers that a patient holds a secret that threatens his family, he must resort to extreme measures to save them.
A very chiseled but somber detective must find a serial killer who leaves clues that only his mentor's nerdy comics-loving son can decipher.
A group of university students decides to test an urban legend about the ghost of a female student that haunts a campus bridge.
In search of his sister, a renegade criminal seeks answers at a sordid hotel where he encounters a sinister guest and romances a mysterious waitress.
After an awful accident, a couple admitted to a grisly hospital are separated and must find each other to escape — before death finds them.
Mentored by an enigmatic tycoon, an ambitious young man faces a crisis when his rise in power draws him deep into the occult.
When he returns from vacation and finds his home occupied by squatters, a family man is caught in a conflict that escalates to terrifying heights.
After a body is found sewn inside a cow hide, a Wroc?aw detective discovers a killer is recreating an 18th-century "plague" of criminal punishments.
While researching corruption for his new book, a successful crime novelist shades the line between fiction and reality.
A year after solving a series of murders, detective Amaia is faced with a related mystery in the Baztán Valley that ends up hitting very close to home.

Movie_Title: Twin Murders: the Silence of the White City
description: A detective returns to Vitoria-Gasteiz to solve murders mimicking those allegedly committed by a serial killer who's about to be released from prison.
An inexperienced murder detective joins a desperate search for a deranged serial killer who possesses a deep obsession with young women’s skin.
An idealistic cop joins an underground police unit and battles ghoulish forces threatening the balance between the human and the supernatural realms.
Back in her childhood home to help her sister care for their comatose mother, Alicia must face a dark force from her past that now threatens her child.
Desperate to keep her husband’s secret, a devoted politician’s wife struggles to stave off threats that could ruin their promising new life.
When an internet-obsessed teen develops a rare illness that forces her to move to a remote town, she must navigate her relationships without technology.
A teenage girl is caught between the affections of two childhood friends while battling the bloodthirsty demon inside of her that manifests at night.
Working in an orphanage, Alia meets teen Nadia, who says she hears a strange voice in the walls. When they try to find the source, things go very wrong.
A minister who researches religious cults turns to his Buddhist monk friend for help investigating a new group with mysterious origins.
Haunted by terrifying visions, a Muslim healer finds his faith tested when he helps a woman locked in battle, body and soul, with a diabolical leader.
When Dilek becomes haunted by evil spirits and loses control of her body, she seeks the help of a woman with dark secrets to cure her.
Ahead of her wedding, Kübra is possessed by demons. When an examination reveals more horror, her friend, a psychiatrist, tries to perform an exorcism.
After a pregnant woman is murdered, her spirit seeks revenge against her increasingly terrified killers, who are determined to finish her off for good.
Adapted from a best-selling novel, this horror film shows Risa befriending ghosts until an evil spirit tries to take her sister to the other side.
A family’s tense reunion turns terrifying when they get trapped in their home by an unknown force, and sinister commands begin appearing on their TV.
A teen's eerie visions become increasingly frequent and terrifying after her longtime friend gets a girlfriend and his abusive dad is strangely killed.
Eerie things begin to happen after a man gives his wife a doll, unaware it once belonged to a girl who was murdered. The first of the "Doll" films.
A mother uses her deceased daughter’s doll as a medium to communicate with her, but the consequences are chilling. The second of the “Doll” films.

Movie_Title: Tim Minchin And The Heritage Orchestra Live
description: Flanked by a full orchestra, Tim Minchin takes the Royal Albert Hall by storm with a wonderfully witty evening of satirical musical comedy.
Comedic pianist Tim Minchin performs a host of his catchy songs that touch on everything from the Middle East to the healing power of canvas bags.
After seducing a philandering con man, a rebellious young woman enlists his help in carrying out a heinous crime against her sister.
A contract killer skilled at staging lethal accidents fears he may be a victim of his own strategy when an accomplice dies in a mysterious mishap.
A toy manufacturer and his wife are terrorized by a demon after their orphaned niece tries to summon her late mother's spirit using a spooky ritual.
Hoping to find answers to her estranged father's mysterious illness, a young woman visits his old villa and uncovers a horrifying truth from the past.

Movie_Title: Club de Cuervos Presents: I, Potro
description: Former Club de Cuervos player Potro returns home to Argentina to crash the wedding of his famous soccer-star brother and confront his estranged family.
A brother-sister team who fake paranormal encounters for cash get more than they bargained for when a job at a haunted estate turns very, very real.
When her little sister claims she sees the dead, Alia consults a psychic, who opens her own eyes to the vengeful ghosts haunting their childhood home.
After his friend is shot, Jon finds a mathematical pattern behind deaths that occurred at the same location and sets out to warn the next young victim.
A shocking assault inspires horrific violence when a group of teens encounters a girl from their school while camping in a remote spot.
While traveling with her German boyfriend, Selma is confronted by the violent remnants of the Bosnian War and the ethnic cleansing her family faced.
Illusionist Derren Brown reinvents the concept of "faith healing” through a series of stunts that debunk the confines of fear, pain and disbelief.
As a zombie plague ravages their rural Quebec town, a scrappy band of survivors join forces to flee the infected hordes in this quiet thriller.

Movie_Title: Trailer Park Boys Live at the North Pole
director: Mike Smith, John Paul Tremblay, Robb Wells
description: Bubbles's plan to spread the true meaning of Christmas is dashed by Julian's wish to cash in on the holiday and Ricky's quest to meet the real Santa.

Movie_Title: Trailer Park Boys Live In F**kin' Dublin
director: Mike Smith, John Paul Tremblay, Robb Wells
description: The boys head to Ireland after winning a contest to see Rush but are arrested by immigration and must perform a community service puppet show.
See what Sunnyvale Trailer Park was like back in the day, featuring Randy as a prostitute, J-Roc before he rapped and Barb and Lahey still together.
Mentalist Derren Brown engineers an audacious social experiment demonstrating how manipulation can lead an ordinary person to commit an appalling act.
When his girlfriend vanishes, a mute man ventures into a near-future Berlin's seamy underworld, where his actions speak louder than words.
Following a tragedy, a mother and her teen son move to a relative's vacant vacation home, where eerie and unexplained forces conspire against them.
A mild-mannered, middle-aged Irish farmer devoted to his mother embarks on a violent quest for revenge when she's murdered in a home invasion.
Three unsuspecting American tourists visit a mysterious mountain shrine in Japan despite uncanny warnings from local inhabitants to stay away.
In the near future, with civilization a thing of the past, a man puts his family in peril when he reluctantly lets outsiders into his compound.
Professional burglar and blowtorch expert Víctor is recruited by the Russian mafia to break into a vault as part of an elaborate bank heist.

Movie_Title: The Fury of a Patient Man
description: After his lover is killed in a jewelry store robbery, quiet José romances café owner Ana, who's unaware he has other motivations.
When shards of a cell phone get lodged in a teenager's brain, he discovers he can control electronic devices and uses his newfound power for revenge.
Erik's peaceful rural family life is shaken by the arrival of sinister figures who claim to know him and a mysterious "friend" who may not even exist.
Young urbanites renovating a rundown house, and a psychiatrist grieving his son's disappearance, are connected to a supernatural, decades-old secret.
After losing her mother, a teenage girl bonds with her phone’s artificial intelligence app, a relationship that soon takes a dark and violent turn.
When a mysterious figure blackmails an adulterous couple during a romantic getaway, their secret affair turns into a fight for survival.
A judge’s kidnapping is streamed live on social media, as a vengeful loner puts him on trial for supposedly sending an innocent man to his death.
A player who uses the internet to facilitate his womanizing ways is tormented when he spurns a persistent woman who won't take no for an answer.
Determined to stop his ex-girlfriend from marrying, a young man crashes the wrong wedding and meets a bride looking to run away.
In the wake of her husband's betrayal, a novelist and mother moves to an old building, where she receives a music box and encounters a strange spirit.
A cardiologist tries to pinpoint the cause of her mother's sudden death as her sister, who witnessed it, claims malevolent demons are at play.
Mountain bikers – including legend Brendan Fairclough – put their skills to the test and engage in daring feats set against vivid backdrops.
Seeking a missing woman in North Dakota, an FBI agent and a sheriff focus on her religious zealot husband but discover something far more sinister.
Friends Proog and Emo live in a capricious, seemingly infinite machine with a sinister purpose in this experimental computer-animated short.
A young couple fights supernatural foes in an attempt to save their daughter from the dark and mysterious forces that follow her every move.
Developers looking for a location to build a resort on Saipan stumble into a subterranean bunker from WWII where an evil force lies in wait.
While filming his daily life for a media course, Cowen discovers his small English town may be under an ominous and otherworldly influence.
A young actress rehearsing for a play about human trafficking begins to relive terrifying scenes that may be dreams – or an alternate reality.
A quiet ex-con's tenuous grip on reality starts to slip when his manipulative mother brings out a part of him he hoped to leave behind.
When a family moves into an upscale housing development, they encounter a series of paranormal events that drive them to the edge of insanity.
A shapeshifter has to kill, then inhabit his victims, or die. But as his need for new bodies speeds up, he finally faces down his own mortality.
Pregnant and overwhelmed, Diana hires a caretaker for her son with severe autism. But she soon begins to fear the new nanny has sinister intentions.
When criminal psychologist Kate Fuller investigates a man who was seemingly murdered in his sleep by his wife, she uncovers a case like no other.
Recently paralyzed in a devastating car accident, Dana begins to suspect a dark and sinister force may be lurking within her hospital room.
An orphan girl taught magic by her sick grandma must find work in seedy Bangkok, where unsavory characters run afoul of her increasingly dark powers.

director: Banjong Pisanthanakun, Paween Purikitpanya, Songyos Sugmakanan, Parkpoom Wongpoom, Visute Poolvoralaks
description: From disfiguring punishments to festering souls, Thai horror masters present five supernatural tales of karma in this sequel to the 4bia anthology.
A family Christmas gathering at an isolated Australian estate turns into the holiday from hell after a mysterious stranger turns up at the door.
After killing a young girl in a hit-and-run accident, a couple is haunted by more than just the memory of their deadly choice.
A psychologist and her mute son confront evil forces at the site of a terrible tragedy involving an ancestral Ouija board and a demonic secret society.

director: Chatchai Katenut, Manussa Vorasingha, Tanwarin Sukkhapisit, Poj Arnon
description: A haunted hotel, a body in a water tank, a nightclub fire and a prison death comprise four horror tales taken from Thailand's newspaper headlines.
A failed businessman must kill himself to pay off a loan shark or his family will die, but a detective discovers the case turns on a shocking secret.
A night out in Paris quickly unravels when two friends provoke the wrong taxi driver, who's after something bigger than cab fare.
After a teenager goes to live with his father in abandoned public housing, he hears strange noises and decides to investigate with his new friend.
As sickness spreads throughout the countryside, an infertile woman conjures a living child out of clay and sets it loose on her enemies.
A withdrawn young woman hunted by a malicious cult is abducted by a brooding stranger and undergoes a bizarre transformation.
Two criminals race down a stairwell, a cop close behind. A bickering family begins a road trip. Their journeys will take far longer than expected.
After a global zombie war, the living dead are confined to a luxury island resort and hunted by tourists on safari – until the security system fails.

Movie_Title: The Rift: The Dark Side of the Moon
description: When a team of special agents is sent to recover the wreckage of a downed satellite in Serbia, their mission takes a horrifying turn.
A couple and their young daughter are haunted by a paranormal, malicious presence – which is soon linked to a temple and a series of abortions.
Five teenagers on the lam hide out in an empty train. Little do they realize that the train is inhabited by ghosts on their way to final judgment.
A doctor and a drug addict kidnap the son of a local gangster, seeking revenge for the death of a loved one.
When a civil war ravages the UK, a scientist awakens in a futuristic cell and is tortured by her captor for information she claims she doesn't possess.
When the Hong Kong government enacts a ban on smoking cigarettes indoors, the new law drives hard-core smokers outside, facilitating unlikely connections.
A bumbling Paris policeman is doggedly determined to capture the master thief that repeatedly eludes him, even when they're the last two men on Earth.
In pursuit of both success and validation, a group of tech-savvy individuals juggle intimate encounters, first impressions and romantic opportunities.
In this sequel to "New Money," Quam, a security guard turned multimillionaire, lives the good life with his fortune until he falls victim to fraud.
A villager in Nigeria becomes the sole beneficiary of his late brother's estate in England, which, according to custom, includes his brother's fiancée.
Two days before their final exams, three teen girls make a seaside getaway to have the time of their lives.
After a painful breakup, a trio of party-loving friends makes a bet: who can get married in three days.
A misplaced cell phone's incriminating content becomes a prime blackmail opportunity for a pair of petty thieves who soon regret their greedy scheme.
A dancer who gets a job cleaning at a struggling drag club dreams of being in the show, and her talent catches an ambitious choreographer's eye.
After a breakup, an influencer takes her friends on a free trip to Bahia's vibrant Carnival, where she learns life's not just about social media likes.
When a housewife's picture-perfect life comes crashing down, she finds solace and hope through cooking, family and love.
After a botched scam, Clóvis bumps into Lohane, his estranged foster sister. In a bind, they soon realize the only way out is to band together.
Short on sense but long on self-confidence, dotty Deliha sets her sights on a hunky photographer who opens up shop in her neighborhood.
On the first day of Ramadan, Ismail joins friends on a road trip to a mosque and encounters his son, who, to Ismail's chagrin, plans a hasty wedding.
Ismail and his old screwball crew land themselves in hot water when his grandson's circumcision evolves into a buzz-making citywide event.
The uneventful life of middle-aged Kudret turns upside down when a road trip turns into a wild race for survival with killers in hot pursuit.
A 30-year-old who's never taken the traditional path to love is tutored by her friends and family before reconnecting with her high school crush.
Days before Eid, a salesman fired from his job drives to Ayval?k to meet his girlfriend's family, but the trip goes astray due to his zany travel buddy.
Seeking the formula behind a magical elixir bequeathed to him by his father, a veterinary professor gets embroiled in a mobster's horse-racing scheme.
In 1974, a rural town in Anatolia gets its first television set – an event that's met with both excitement and trepidation by the villagers.
Workaholic Will puts his humdrum life in LA on hold to fulfill his grandpa's last wish: visiting Mexico City's most iconic sights and falling in love.

director: Appie Boudellah, Aram van de Rest
description: Incurable romantic Lotte finds her life upended when her plans for a picture-perfect wedding unravel — just as her self-absorbed sister gets engaged.
Trying to fix their relationships, four couples attend a spiritual retreat at a Caribbean resort, where temptation and mishaps add problems to the mix.
A young, overworked ad executive with an overbearing boss starts her own side hustle and invents an employer once her business begins to flourish.
The slacker owner of a public bath house rallies his community to save it when a big developer comes to town to close it down and open a new mall.
Bored with her life and inspired by a friend's wedding, Esra quits her job and dumps her boyfriend, leading to a series of romantic misadventures.
Didem tries everything to get actor Cem to propose to her, but he's got other things on his mind: a beautiful new co-star and a secret bachelor party.
When a narco past his prime refuses to pay a debt to an upstart, only a secret stash of money can save his men. But guess what the gardener just found?
After spending a wild night together, Adri discovers the only way to see Carla again is to become a patient at the psychiatric center where she resides.
Four school buddies — a director, a temp worker, an insurance salesman and a paper craftsman — grapple with unfulfilled dreams amid middle age ennui.

Movie_Title: The Misadventures of Hedi and Cokeman
description: In Paris, two dysfunctional dealers use family ties to try to boost their small drug business in this crass comedy based on the webseries.
A group of friends at a New Year’s Eve party go through a whirlwind of events that exposes secrets, breaks hearts — and leads to a shocking outcome.
Two women in their 70s decide to come out to their families and get married, sparking chaos — and threatening a granddaughter's engagement.
Entrenched in a midlife crisis, Aziz seeks solace from his mundane job, lonesome friends and rowdy family while pretending to have his act together.
With the peak of his career long behind him, an actor clings to his past glory — until a sudden wake-up call forces him to face who he's become.
After failing to deliver for a demanding bride, a wedding planner makes a bold business move and throws the wedding of the year — for herself.
Three gay siblings are told by their terminally ill father that they must each produce a grandchild in order to inherit their share of his fortune.
A man foils an attempted murder, then flees the crew of would-be killers along with their intended target as a woman he's just met tries to find him.
A resilient housewife, her husband and their marriage therapist become mired in a toxic love triangle and a plot to obtain an antique manuscript.
After a serious accident, Lucie tries to rediscover herself as a dancer and meets Vincent, a talented b-boy battling his own insecurities.
Stuck in a time loop where it's forever Christmas, a family man who hates the holiday starts to learn valuable lessons about what's important in life.
A gifted young singer becomes an instant sensation on a popular talent show. But her real goal is earning the love of her father, a member of the jury.
In a small town, a trans teen with a vibrant personality shakes up her high school's conservative ways while trying to secure her first kiss.
When the father of a boy with Down syndrome resists his neighbors' efforts to have the child institutionalized, miraculous events begin to occur.
A group of singletons stumbles through the wild dating scene in Nairobi as two friends wonder if their relationship is more than platonic.
When three adult siblings meet the offbeat man who their widowed mom fawns over, they take drastic actions to stop them from ever getting married.
A woman recovering from an attempted suicide meets an aspiring doctor who takes a keen interest in her efforts to move forward in life through dance.
An ad creative and a successful exec have a great marriage — until he wants to be a dad just as her star is rising. Then he brings someone new home.
Two exes run into each other at a wedding hall and realize they still harbor romantic feelings. The one problem? They just got married to other people.
A disillusioned security guard transforms into a masquerade, channeling ancestral spirits as he roams the streets of Lagos.
When his former partners vote to sell off a pricey piece of stolen jewelry, a thief recruits his grandson to help him retain it and repent for his deed.
A teen girl is drawn to her cousin’s hedonistic lifestyle when they spend the summer together in Cannes as she learns about herself and her own values.

Movie_Title: Berlin, Berlin: Lolle on the Run
description: In this cinematic sequel to the hit TV series, Lolle has moved on from Sven and is about to marry her friend Hart – until Sven disrupts her plans.
While her free-living bestie urges her to embrace singlehood, a commitment-craving social media expert can't stop following the life of a former love.
After a man promises his fiancé a dream wedding, he must keep up with her outrageous requests to have the most lavish ceremony possible.
To pull off a massive heist, a charismatic con artist attempts to rob a fortified home with the help of a team he can't completely trust.
From campy lies to sexy surprises, this collection of vignettes captures the follies of several men as they fumble with fidelity and relationships.

Movie_Title: The Perfect Picture: Ten Years Later
description: From flawed husbands to shaky finances, new complications test a close circle of friends who must lean on each other in a new decade of their lives.
An ex-movie extra plans to win his wife back by making a fantasy film, but neither he nor his crew has a knack for filmmaking.
While vacationing on the beaches of Riccione, a group of teens become friends and help each other manage romantic relationships and summer crushes.
To celebrate the memory of their pal who passed away, three estranged friends attempt to reconnect on an eventful road trip from Abu Dhabi to Beirut.
To save a kidnapped loved one, a pack of wealthy men must return to their vigilante past when they are blackmailed to pull off a treacherous heist.
A mayoral candidate wins office, promising to turn a small province into its own country as a war and wacky events with his wife and advisors ensue.
Raised by a father to fraudulently act as one person, three identical brothers end up pining for the same woman as one triplet seeks psychiatric help.
As a man fumbles to keep things in order, his assertive grandmother tries to straighten out his life when she returns to live with him.
When Omar's grandfather forces him to get a job at a tech company in Mexico City, he meets a quirky ensemble of nine-to-fivers ... and some nemeses.
After Marcos is dumped by his girlfriend, he attempts to reinvent himself as a modern man with the help of a childhood friend and an online guru.
When a local musician and his band are forced to perform in honor of a right-wing coup, his daughter schemes to make their music subversive instead.
A former goalkeeper-turned-talent scout embarks on a mischievous adventure to recruit players for Egyptian football clubs.
When his jealous sister plots to wreck his engagement, a young man does everything he can to protect his betrothed from her devious schemes.
As an honest locksmith scrambles to pay his late father's hefty debt to the mafia, he crosses paths with a woman in similar trouble and falls for her.
After 20 years abroad, a photographer returns to his birth country of Egypt and gets stranded without identification in a now unfamiliar culture.
Facing pressure to marry immediately, an unemployed man must find a way to pay for a wedding by any means necessary.
Mourning their father's death, a dysfunctional trio of siblings must face selling their beloved childhood beach house — and dealing with each other.
In one of the poorest areas of Paris, a school counselor devotes herself to working with disadvantaged students, while facing challenges of her own.
After her best friend dies, Barbs attempts to rediscover herself until love leaves her true identity — and heart — in question.
After knocking a celebrity unconscious before a huge job, a bumbling pack of pals tries to avoid a lawsuit by replacing her with a look-alike.
After his father dies, a young mechanic moves to the city to drive the old man’s taxi, and encounters assassins and a motley crew of urban weirdos.
As a son deals with his own struggles, he must calm his father's obsession with fishing before his outlandish behavior ruins the entire family.
A billionaire's daughter fakes a relationship with a cash-strapped boxer in order to coerce her parents into letting her pursue her culinary dreams.
To impress family, a factory owner pretends to be married to one of his employees, and soon, the "couple" finds their lives radically altered.
When Emilio (Oscar Martínez) is diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease, he and his family embark on a quest to reunite him with his childhood crush.

director: Nuhash Humayun, Syed Ahmed Shawki, Rahat Rahman, Robiul Alam Robi, Golam Kibria Farooki, Mir Mukarram Hossain, Tanvir Ahsan, Mahmudul Islam, Abdullah Al Noor, Krishnendu Chattopadhyay, Syed Saleh Ahmed Sobhan
description: Eleven emerging Bangladeshi filmmakers present a collection of gritty shorts centered on the capital city and the people living in its margins.
A divorced couple decides to continue sharing a home but their already-delicate cohabiting scheme unravels when they begin dating other people.
A newly engaged couple's romantic vacation in Jamaica turns into a mischievous adventure that tests their union in wild and unexpected ways.
When a couple leaning toward divorce meets with a pastor for counseling, an unexpected development shakes up their marriage.
Nollywood star Ramsey Nouah learns that someone is impersonating him and breaks out of a mental institution to expose the imposter.
After an expensive night out, two flatmates get tangled in an overnight misadventure to recover their rent money to pay their dead landlord's daughter.
The residents of an isolated town look to revive their home's identity when a group of foreigners unexpectedly arrive, bringing culture shock with them.
With Christmas just around the corner, sisters Miranda and Lyla bring their families to their childhood home, where rivalries don't take a holiday.
Pressured to marry a nice Orthodox Jewish woman, Motti is thrown for a loop when he falls for classmate Laura, who his mother will never approve of.
To find his therapy dog, a 17-year-old escapes from juvie and embarks on a journey of reconnection with his brother and grandmother through Cantabria.
A mother's plan to find her bachelor son a match derails when a new prospect turns up and sinister schemes unfold.
A robbery leaves a proprietor penniless before his wedding, but becoming a son-in-law to a second family might be the financial solution he needs.
After the man she thought she'd marry breaks up with her, Ana joins a class for single women who are in search of a husband.
When struggling singer Onur decides to return to his old job, incurable klutz ?eref organizes a surprise tour full of pitfalls and mishaps.
When an unattractive man gets engaged to a beautiful woman, their families oppose the union and the priest set to perform the ceremony is kidnapped.
Too hungover to report as a witness in a criminal trial the day after his birthday party, a young man and his pals do some unexpected soul-searching.
The discovery of the tomb of William Tell’s son in a town in the Basque Country spurs the village's cantankerous citizens to lobby for Swiss annexation.
Stranded in the woods and eyeballed by twisted hunters, members of a women’s volleyball team bump it up in the most dangerous game of their lives.
When her estranged mother suddenly dies, a woman must follow the quirky instructions laid out in the will in order to collect an important inheritance.
Hoping to reunite with a dying friend, two longtime pals re-create their desert road trip from Spain to Mali, bringing along his estranged daughter.
The owner of a failing music club throws one last blowout, bringing together friends, foes and hard-partying weirdos for an unhinged New Year's Eve.
After a five-year suspension, a once-legendary race car driver decides to get back in the game against a new generation of opponents.
After her partner cheats on her, an architect returns to her hometown to reassess her life with the help of her eccentric family. Based on the novel.
After their mother's death, four sisters learn a shocking family secret and embark on an adventure to discover the truth about their genealogy.
When a neighbor blocks their view of the city with a commercial billboard, a Hong Kong family resorts to drastic, imaginative measures to take it down.
When a newly single photographer is forced to work with a longtime rival, the battle of their egos turns into a chance for love.
When his daughter and son-in-law fall prey to a scam, Istanbul con man As?m Noyan meets his match in a madcap kingpin of an underground gambling world.
When aspiring fashion designer Andi reconnects with her ex-boyfriend Max, she's surprised to learn that he's in a relationship with a man.
A PR agent trying to find her stolen phone, a politician in trouble, and a fading celebrity find their lives intertwining in unexpected, messy ways.
A hard-driving real estate tycoon who becomes ill with cancer hires a medical caretaker who helps her begin to mend fences with her estranged son.
A dying father asks his busy and grown children to spend their Sundays with him, forcing his family to confront their issues before it's too late.
Two best friends put their careers and marriages on the line when they launch a business hosting outrageous, anything-goes bachelor parties in Hungary.
Inspired by the movie "Thelma & Louise," three young people with Down syndrome leave the institution where they live to take a road trip together.
For the right price, BFFs Jen and Mel will ruthlessly end any romance. But when one of them grows a conscience, their friendship begins to unravel.
Competing con artists attempt to creatively and ruthlessly swindle a fatherly lottery winner while on a lively cruise from Spain to Mexico.
A teen navigates a bitter feud between his willful mom and a free-spirited man, who's the lover and insurance beneficiary of his recently deceased dad.
Cherie and Jimmy's relationship is in a rut – until Cherie's estranged father shows up and a woman from Jimmy's past shows up with a hidden agenda.
A sly art dealer tries to revive the career of his longtime pal, a surly painter, with a risky plan that tests their morals and friendship.
Two strangers meet on a dating app and experience instant chemistry, but their relationship unravels as jarring differences catch up to them.
Troubled by his past, a scam artist who runs a petty racket with his adoptive mom finds redemption while mentoring a group of difficult students.
Four man-children in an elite tactical unit gallivant around Macau for a weekend of debauchery that gets them in trouble with the law.
An executive-turned-viral sensation loses his reputation and his memory, but finds a new life with his biological mother and her empowered dance group.
To spice up a dinner party, old friends agree to share every private message that pops up on their phones – with disastrous results.
After finding love in drug-free Dubai, Stefan returns to Germany to grab documents for his wedding. But old buddy Kai's bad habits complicate things.
After meeting by chance, two young musicians with differing views on love and life record an album that drastically alters their lives.
A rude, self-centered businessman seems to be on the brink of losing everything until a night janitor at his office helps him find redemption.

Movie_Title: How to Get Over a Breakup
description: A heartbroken ad copywriter living in Lima, Peru, is inspired to write a blog about life as a single woman and is surprised by her website's success.

Movie_Title: Monty Python Live (Mostly): One Down, Five to Go
description: Live from London in a sold-out final show, surviving members of the British comedy troupe reprise old roles and break out in irreverent song and dance.

Movie_Title: Monty Python: Before the Flying Circus
description: Discover how six seemingly ordinary but supremely talented men became Monty Python, sketch comedy's revolutionary comedy troupe.
A physicist uses the laws of thermodynamics to describe romance and relationships, but his theories prove faulty when it comes to his own love life.
An aspiring writer with no imagination seeks inspiration for his novel by manipulating the lives of his neighbors so that he can write about them.
A group of students celebrates New Year's at a remote Belgian estate, where their substance-fueled revelry soon descends into a bloodstained nightmare.

Movie_Title: El club de los buenos infieles
description: Four childhood buddies in passionless marriages try a counterintuitive idea: a secret club for men who want to cheat – to regain lust for their wives.
Just as Simone works up the courage to tell her conservative Jewish family she's a lesbian, she finds herself attracted to a male Senegalese chef.
After surviving a bomb attack, two low-level mobsters in Jerusalem change their ways and set about making strangers' Wailing Wall prayers come true.
After telling a white lie that spins out of control, the son of an Iraqi-born cleric in Melbourne becomes torn between family duty and his own heart.
Amid growing tensions in their marriage, a Johannesburg professor and his journalist wife find their lives upended by a famous, hard-partying author.
Along with her two friends, a determined woman travels to Vietnam to bring home the baby her recently deceased daughter had planned to adopt.

Movie_Title: Si saben cómo me pongo żpá qué me invitan?
description: When four unhappy couples attend a spiritual retreat at a resort to try and solve their relationship troubles, shenanigans ensue.
A Spaniard working in Argentina sees his life upended after accidentally giving bad directions to a passerby, who demands compensation for the error.
A young priest coaches a team of uncoordinated monks in order to win a soccer tournament and save their monastery from being turned into a hotel.
A record company exec joins his estranged dad, a famous photographer who's dying, on a road trip to the last lab still developing Kodachrome film.
A Brazilian man tries a myriad of ways to get over his breakup with his girlfriend but is surprised to learn it's more difficult than he anticipated.

Movie_Title: I Am not an Easy Man
description: A shameless chauvinist gets a taste of his own medicine when he wakes up in a world dominated by women and locks horns with a powerful female author.
Rejected by the Marines but eager to serve his country after 9/11, a simple-minded man performs amateur terrorist surveillance with a young runaway.
Tired of her passionless marriage, Marianne wants a separation from her husband, Gustav, who, in response, decides to make a big change of his own.
A director and a comedian want to shoot the "comedy of the future" and make cinema history, but soon run out of resources and run into mission creep.

director: Mike Smith, John Paul Tremblay, Robb Wells
description: "Trailer Park Boys" John Paul Tremblay, Robb Wells and Mike Smith host this foulmouthed live kick-off of their Web-based Swearnet network.

Movie_Title: Trailer Park Boys: Say Goodnight to the Bad Guys
description: A year after the Season 7 finale, the boys are poised to live the good life. But an old enemy throws a wrench in things once again.
In this musical comedy, two rebellious teen girls who love electronic music have a life-changing brush with the divine at a camp run by nuns.
Teens of Korean descent who were born and raised in other countries travel to Seoul to learn about their cultural heritage at a summer camp in 1986.
Mathias's girlfriend finds a business card for a wedding planner in his pocket. Suddenly, he's engaged and hiring his lover to plan the big day!
A laid-back civil servant and wealthy video blogger struggle to make it as a modern couple amid strict Saudi social conventions.
In this dark comedy, a dysfunctional group of wannabe Basque terrorists awaits word about a new mission while Spain makes a run at the World Cup title.
Three brothers-in-law join forces to secretly drive away their daughters' undesirable boyfriends: anarchist Álex, bad-boy Dani and playboy Ernesto.
Worried he’s lost his artistic edge, a wealthy expat novelist returns to his backwater hometown in Argentina, where he’s regarded as a local hero.
A self-described outsider is sent to a rugby-obsessed boarding school, where he forms an unexpected bond with the star player.
A womanizing musician travels to India, where he composes a Bollywood film score and unexpectedly falls for the wife of the French ambassador.
When a fashion blogger falls for a video game vlogger, their romance goes viral. But separating their virtual life from reality gets complicated.
When a twisted killer tells the police he'll only speak to a fictional 1980s TV detective, the washed-up actor who played him takes the gig.
When French-African couple Paul and Sali discover the longed-for baby they are about to adopt is white, family chaos and confrontation ensue.

Movie_Title: The 101-Year-Old Man Who Skipped Out on the Bill and Disappeared
description: In need of money, an eccentric ex-spy and his younger octogenarian partner embark on an international quest for a valuable Soviet soda formula.
Teen father-to-be Sam imagines his future as a young parent and finds a surprising mentor while reading about his idol, pro skateboarder Tony Hawk.
A love-challenged man and a woman he meets at a bookshop bar begin dating, but only at the shop – and without knowing anything about each other.
A famous designer who's always pretended to be gay finds himself in crisis mode when threatened with exposure as the woman-chasing straight guy he is.
A seasoned couples therapist comes to realize she might need help with her own marriage after meeting a new pair of young clients.

Movie_Title: David Brent: Life on the Road
description: With "The Office" long in the past, middling salesman David Brent ditches work and goes on tour with his rock band in a disastrous stab at stardom.
When three brothers struggling to go straight become targets of a criminal underworld, they use the making of a movie as a front to transport drugs.
The lives of three dissatisfied brothers running a family bridal shop turn topsy-turvy when one of them has to care for his ex-girlfriend's baby.
Spanish provincialism is put into the spotlight as a man from the Basque Country embarks on a mission to keep his daughter from marrying a Catalan.
In counseling sessions with his therapist, preoccupied Yvan shares stories of anti-Semitism and what it's like to live as a Jew in modern France.
Four small-town French teens who style themselves after American rappers set out to avenge a classroom insult and end up on a mind-blowing adventure.
When a fit of anger leads to a serious injury, a sidelined soccer star returns to his hometown and reluctantly agrees to train the local youth.
An unemployed man gets a job as an extra at the shooting of a New Year's Eve TV special that's beset by crises and seems to go on forever.
When frustrated politicians name a historical figure as the next president, an honest, humble man by the same name suddenly becomes Italy's leader.
When they lose their passports, a bickering radio team invents phony reports from a combat zone in a ruse that becomes increasingly complicated.

Movie_Title: Trailer Park Boys: Drunk, High and Unemployed: Live in Austin
director: Gary Howsam, Mike Smith, John Paul Tremblay, Robb Wells
description: Ricky, Julian and Bubbles bring their trailer park humor out onto the stage for a night of bravado, schemes and an intoxicated acting demo.
Vignettes of the summer holidays follow vacationers as they battle mosquitoes, suffer ruined plans and otherwise hit snags in their precious time off.
Three lifelong friends travel to Acapulco ostensibly so one of them can find his lost love, but the real reason behind the trip holds some surprises.

Movie_Title: Alarmoty in the Land of Fire
description: While vacationing at a resort, an ornery and outspoken man is held captive by a criminal organization.
The brotherly bond between three childhood friends – one Sikh, one Muslim and one Catholic – is tested by the often comic absurdities of adulthood.
Eager to settle down, Abdullah searches for the right woman to marry – but the one he truly longs for may not feel the same way.
Kat and Eva’s happy romance hits a rough patch when Eva decides that she wants a child. Visiting friend Roger could help complete their family.
Learning he is the grandson of a famous knight, a young man hilariously fights a rival gang to win over the most beautiful woman in the tribe.
In an attempt to settle the "nature vs. nurture" debate, a scientist couple raises three children to live lives that defy their genetic dispositions.
Dumped over a video he made to amuse his ailing dad, a heartsick Jérémy hatches an elaborate scheme to win back his superhero-loving girlfriend, Lola.
On the island of Curaçao, an amiable scam artist angers gangsters and flees to Holland, where his conscience is torn between a woman and a new scheme.
When Julia literally falls into Alejandro's backyard from her apartment above, it's just the jolt that's needed to nudge these two loners together.
When their aging father’s illness reunites two sisters under one roof, new tensions arise between them as old wounds and hidden secrets surface.
When a wealthy patriarch unexpectedly drops dead, his money-crazed family, friends and staff scramble for his billionaire fortune.

Movie_Title: Dead in a Week (Or Your Money Back)
description: After several failed attempts at taking his own life, a young man hires an aging assassin who’ll do anything to fend off retirement.
A clarinet player who lives with his grandparents in a small village is forced to move to Istanbul, where he meets a singer enjoying sudden fame.
A beauty expert, a drug dealer and a bungling revolutionary end up in the grips of an extremist group after meeting on a plane to Lebanon.
When a goofy but likable millionaire discovers his fiancée’s plan to steal his wealth, he devises an unromantic scheme to make her life a living hell.
When climate change makes Egypt freeze over, intelligence officers pose as a film crew on location to seek a device that can eliminate the frost.

Movie_Title: Green White Green (And All the Beautiful Colours in My Mosaic of Madness)
description: Three young Nigerian bohemians, each from one of the country's major ethnic groups, explore the directions in which their lives could go.
When an earthquake hits Chile, rescue workers must put aside their differences to save the country from a businessman's evil scheme.
When an uneducated mother of eight suddenly becomes mayor, she uses the skills she's learned as a housewife to keep her town running like clockwork.
Trying to resurrect his career, not-so-talented magician Iskender goes on tour, but things get iffy when one of his illusions works a little too well.
Two new monks, one of them a former rock music star seeking inner peace, join a temple plagued by thieves who are stealing its valuable holy relics.
When a resourceful but flighty Londoner is threatened with eviction, she vows to do whatever it takes to defeat a greedy real estate agent.
When Eva and Alex decide to wed in England, where they met three years earlier, obstacles including a labor strike and a volcano keep them apart.
When he sets out to avenge his son's murder, mild-mannered snowplow driver Nils sparks a war between a Norwegian mobster and his Serbian rival.
When a recently single psychologist moves to a new neighborhood, she finds friendship with women starting to rebel against years of domestic abuse.
Three best buddies are thrown into a wild chase for a priceless painting that was stolen from a house they used to throw a huge party.
After winning a shared trip to a soccer match, two colleagues who hold opposite world views find they're stuck traveling together for the duration.

When the Hong Kong government enacts a ban on smoking cigarettes indoors, the new law drives hard-core smokers outside, facilitating a meeting between Cherie, a makeup saleswoman, and Jimmy, an advertising exec.
Three men from different nations must find their way out of the Amazon jungle – on foot – when they get lost on the way to Brazil's World Cup Final.
Hoping to pump up their sound, a punk band hires Pepe, a keyboardist with Down Syndrome, but tensions erupt when he steals the show with his talent.

Movie_Title: Merry Men: The Real Yoruba Demons
description: Four of the richest bachelors in Abuja, Nigeria enjoy a life of fast cars, palatial homes and female attention while concealing their true activities.
Seeking revenge on his employer, a lazy bank agent and his two dim-witted friends concoct an elaborate but flawed heist.
A recently dumped attorney hires a psychic to help her win back her boyfriend. Things take an unexpected turn when another ex re-enters the picture.
A woman enters a quirky mental health clinic after attempting suicide upon finding out her husband is having an affair with her best friend.
Fed up with the uselessness of their degrees and swayed by a TV commercial, two Spaniards head to Berlin for work but find it not quite as advertised.
The spirited trio are back to take on a new ghost-busting adventure at a mens' residence, where spooky secrets lurk around every corner.
After a body is discovered in their building, a vengeful, paranormal presence begins to affect Taew, Mod Dum and Cartoon's business.
In this second sequel of the trilogy, marital strife brews as Omar pursues a music career despite Salma’s wishes that he opt for a more stable job.
Sent to a remote village to write a screenplay, Sinan finds inspiration to spare in colorful locals, farcical misadventures and the craziness of love.
Mak's friends just want to protect him, but his wife Nak won't let a small thing like her own death get in the way of true love in this horror-comedy.
To save his parents’ home, a lottery-squandering 32-year-old man sublets a room to a disarmingly creepy tenant.
Desperate to support his son, a single father uses his talent with makeup to dress up as a woman to try out for a part in a commercial.
When his boyhood crush Ern returns, Ped forms a band with his friend to impress her. Romantic rivalries bloom after the talented Ern joins the group.
A young man determined to renounce Catholicism by having his baptismal records excised is thwarted by church bureaucracy and his own inner conflicts.
Britain's most ineffective but caring teacher takes his class to Cornwall for one last school trip, where anything could happen –
Jesus, who's hitting the big 3-0, brings a surprise guest to meet the family. A Christmas special so wrong, it must be from comedians Porta dos Fundos.
In this biblical "Hangover" spoof, the apostles awaken to find Jesus is missing and must piece together events of the previous night's wild Last Supper.
Fed up with dating and debt, a naďve college senior documents her experience of being with a wealthy, older man for a gonzo journalism grant.
To save his father’s company from bankruptcy, a rich, spoiled playboy is forced to wed a no-nonsense woman, who's just as unhappy to be marrying him.
The personal barber to the president, as well as his wife and only son, get tangled in the political chaos that gripped South Korea in the late 1900s.
Comedians Steve Coogan and Rob Brydon gorge on local delicacies and celebrity impressions as they reunite for a hilarious road trip through Spain.
Never ones to think things through, two Irish teens steal bicycles and set off to the coast to find a bale of cocaine from a smuggler’s capsized ship.
A happy woman's new love is going great, but she needs one thing: divorce papers from her depressed ex. To get them, trickery may be in order.
Returning to Ibiza after several years walking the straight and narrow in London, Connor falls back in with a criminal crowd. It's like he never left.
After most of her family is murdered in a terrorist bombing, a young woman is unknowingly lured into joining the very group that killed them.
When a powerful businesswoman’s political ambitions are threatened by her underworld connections, the ensuing power struggle could cost her everything.

Movie_Title: El patrón, radiografía de un crimen
description: A lawyer defends an illiterate man whose exploitation by a cruel boss while working as a butcher in Buenos Aires led to tragedy. Based on a true case.
A woman from a tough neighborhood outside Mexico City comes home a rock star, inadvertently provoking a confrontation with the ghosts of her past.
Working as a Mossad spy assigned to Tehran, Rachel reaches her breaking point. Now it’s dangerously hard to tell whose side she’s on.

Movie_Title: The Last Letter From Your Lover
description: After finding a trove of love letters from 1965, a reporter sets out to solve the mystery of a secret affair — while embarking on a romance of her own.
Separated as children, three cousins with an unshakeable bond confront their painful pasts and embark on an emotional journey to find each other.

director: Sita Likitvanichkul, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Thanabodee Uawithya, Adirek Wattaleela
description: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control — and must find a way out before it’s too late.
A cop in Singapore investigates the disappearance of a Chinese migrant construction worker who spent sleepless nights playing a mysterious video game.
In this stylish remake, a disillusioned mastermind assembles a team to pull off a series of spectacular heists — but his crimes make too many enemies.
A bright and promising young girl gets abducted and taken to a terrorist camp, where she unexpectedly crosses paths with her soulmate.
Abducted during the Lebanese Civil War and now in his 50s, Ramez is finally a free man. But he returns to society deeply traumatized by the past.
An infatuated fan finds an unexpected way to meet her celebrity crush and discovers a dark reality behind the facade of fame and her fantasy world.
Ambushed by the Taliban, a First Nations soldier from Canada gets captured but escapes in a harrowing journey that stirs up memories of love and loss.
This film follows the societal challenges three strangers in Beirut go through as unexpected events link their fates.
Tensions rise and untold secrets surface for three royal sisters when a family treasure is stolen the night before an antique auction.
Philandering his way across Europe to find the grandfather he's never met, William unexpectedly befriends a 14-year-old who changes how he sees women.
To escape an arranged marriage, a woman flees into the depths of the Mayan jungle, where untamed nature merges the human and the supernatural.
When a business mogul hires an exotic dancer for a weekend of entertainment, it quickly morphs into a messy situation full of misunderstanding.
Fed up with abuse by those around her, a department store saleswoman finds a weapon in an alleyway and decides to settle scores.

Movie_Title: The Day I lost My Shadow
description: As winter hits hard and resources run low in Damascus, a single mom heads to the war-scarred outskirts looking for gas to prepare her son a warm meal.
The story of Roberto Baggio, one of the best soccer players of all time, including his career highs, triumphs over injuries and discovery of Buddhism.
Before he built a drug empire, Ferry Bouman returns to his hometown on a revenge mission that finds his loyalty tested — and a love that alters his life.
A gay congressman marries the Mexican president's daughter but cavorts with a young man at a secret club. And then scandal hits. Based on a true story.
An immigration lawyer and a Nigerian woman caught in a ring of corruption team up to uncover the truth behind a suspicious death in a detention center.
A law student joins an anti-fascist group and finds herself sucked into increasingly dangerous situations and drawn more and more to violence.
After living 50 years in the UK, Anthony Bryan is wrongfully detained by the government and threatened with deportation. Based on true events.
While investigating the death of a businessman, a prosecutor and his wife uncover occult secrets as they face their own life-and-death dilemma.
Down and out of luck, the manager of a shady gas station gets in over his head when he tries to steal from his grubby employers.
Inspired by Nobel Peace Prize winner Malala Yousafzai, a young girl defies the expectations of her father and village to pursue an education
The loss of a child plunges Sade into a suicidal depression, but her suffering leads to faith – with a little assist from modern technology.
In 1960s Paris, Madame Claude's influence extends beyond the world of sex work — until an affluent young woman threatens to change everything.
An immature young father in Akita becomes an outcast in his community after a media incident. Two years later he returns to ineptly try to make amends.
Yusuf and his daughter set out to buy his wife an anniversary gift, a gesture demanding much patience and negotiation skills in the West Bank.
In the streets of Istanbul, ailing waste warehouse worker Mehmet takes a small boy under his wing and must soon confront his own traumatic childhood.
Basque Country, 1609. To postpone their execution, a group of women accused of witchcraft lure their inquisitor into witnessing the witches' Sabbath.
A struggling music student discovers and tries to complete an unfinished symphony begun by a famous composer, whose career was ended by a past trauma.
Amid the violence of Pinochet's reign in 1978 Chile, emotionally dead Raúl finds escape in his obsession over the protagonist in "Saturday Night Fever."
A reflective man must come to terms with his forced displacement from Vietnam when he returns to his birthplace to spread his parents' ashes.
In 1950s Italy, a passionate free spirit dreams of love, justice and a better life till a forbidden affair threatens everything. Based on real events.
Following her mother's abrupt departure, a dynamic and determined teen goes to extraordinary lengths to protect and provide for her younger brother.
In a story of interconnected lives, three families of different religious faiths navigate conflicting beliefs, hardships and other struggles.
Grieving the death of her grandfather, Neige navigates family conflict and questions her world in this meditation about cultural identity and roots.
In 1987, as martial law ends in Taiwan, Jia-han and Birdy fall in love amid family pressure, homophobia and social stigma.
Gruff and alone, retiree Rene rejects most human contact but begins to soften when he comes to terms with his homosexuality.
A student must navigate issues of sexuality, identity and family amid Sri Lanka's social turmoil of the 1970s and 1980s.
Surrounded by tensions and secrets, a teenage boy searches for validation and navigates life with a dysfunctional family following an HIV diagnosis.
Battling terminal cancer, a woman writes a one of a kind notebook about life, death and love for her son to remember her by. Based on a true story.
A chance encounter soon intertwines the lives of a reserved businessman and a vibrant photographer who is living with a grave heart condition.
To cope with a friend's death, a teen blogs about his daily life but falls further into an existential crisis while experiencing a sexual awakening.
A couple facing fertility issues finds their marriage tested on a vacation to a Sardinian resort — and the family next door only adds to the tension.
A bright student in Nigeria takes on the academic establishment when she reports a popular professor who tried to rape her. Based on real events.
After a sex video subjects her friend to mockery and bullying, a transfer student sets out to reveal the truth as campus secrets come to light.

director: Aitor Arregi, Jon Garańo, Jose Mari Goenaga
description: Fearing retribution, a Republican from the Spanish Civil War hides in his home for more than 30 years with the help of his wife. Based on true events.
In the 1960s, Australian singer Helen Reddy struggles with misogyny in the music business — until she records an anthem for the women's movement.
After years apart, a former couple reunites and gets reacquainted with the pains of love as they work to heal wounds from the past.
A sound engineer falls for a model but after an unfortunate accident, he fights to save their love by triggering her senses.
A taxi driver new to Beirut forms an unlikely bond with a bored American Pilates instructor who loves hearing him tell stories about his past.
In an occupied village, a teen girl is set to wed a stranger. But when she crosses over to meet her betrothed, her heart gets entangled at the border.
A mother arrives in war-torn Lebanon looking for her missing son in the South as a cab driver agrees to escort her on her dangerous trip.
When Lebanon's Civil War deprives Zozo of his family, he's left with grief and little means as he escapes to Sweden in search of his grandparents.
A pair of petty criminals from different backgrounds get tangled up in a gangster's kidnapping scheme that goes awry.
In Lagos, a journalist goes undercover as a prostitute to expose human trafficking. What she finds is a world of exploited women and ruthless violence.
A daring farmer steals illicit ivory from a group of international terrorists and must elude their dangerous and deadly games.
Unable to face his new reality in a wheelchair, Ángel develops a deadly obsession with the woman who left him and unleashes a sinister revenge plot.
When their glamorous, fast-paced lifestyle comes to a screeching halt, two sisters try to rebuild their fortunes through music and enterprise.
Eleven-year-old Amy starts to rebel against her conservative family’s traditions when she becomes fascinated with a free-spirited dance crew.
A toll booth operator's mundane life is upended when he's reassigned to a remote spot, where he finds intriguing strangers — and a new side to himself.
Tipped by a mysterious tramp, a meek fry cook discovers she has superpowers — and kindred spirits — and uncovers an unsavory, widespread conspiracy.
One football match on a dirt pitch near Rome becomes a day of reckoning as a young player, his coach and their team's owner wrestle internal demons.
High in the Andes, a teenage boy and his father work together as artisans. But their bond is shattered when the son learns of his father's secret life.
Newly released from prison, a man returning to his girlfriend and their child subsequently learns about a dangerous debt taken by his late mother.
A Nigerian musician travels to Brazil to search for his estranged brother, who is living a life very different than the one his family thought.
A duplicitous young man finds success in the dark world of social media smear tactics — but his virtual vitriol soon has violent real-life consequences.
A bullied teenager gravitates toward the acceptance he finds in a street gang but soon ends up involved in a world of drug abuse and organized crime.
Love came naturally for married couple Sonoko and Tetsuo. But his secret profession as a love doll designer clashes with her deeper, darker secret.
Diagnosed with colon cancer, a free-spirited man embarks on an illuminating road trip with his son through South Africa.

Movie_Title: Hunter in the Blue Side of Manchester
description: To honor his father, a diligent college graduate takes on the daunting goal of becoming a reporter for an English Premier League soccer club.
Near a Spanish town in northern Africa, a child takes a painful journey, a father reconnects with his daughter and a coast guard is guilt stricken.
Barely making a living as pickpockets, a teenage couple in Manila resort to desperate measures when their one-month-old child is kidnapped.
A former child singer, traumatized by his experiences, becomes a recluse, nurturing his hurt until a woman comes into his life and really hears him.
A chance encounter brings a brash, wealthy young man and an underprivileged woman together when they get stuck in an elevator and she goes into labor.
Two strangers cross paths on a train en route to Izmir, bonding over their turbulent — and unexpectedly intertwined — romantic pasts.
Based on a true and gripping story: Cuban spies infiltrate exile groups in the 1990s to stop terrorism against the island, but at a high personal cost.
In 1976 Beirut, after a rendezvous with her old flame, soon-to-wed Noha witnesses a violent incident and changes course on a path to self-realization.
After the election-night murder of her campaign manager at a polling site, a gubernatorial candidate challenges the corrupt incumbent's victory.
Police officer Pipa works on her first big case while simultaneously investigating her boss, who is suspected of murder. The prequel to "Perdida".
A Nigerian couple living in the U.S. face agonizing fallout when they defy deportation orders with the hopes of giving their unborn child citizenship.
New to London, a naive and desperate teenager tries to fit in but instead becomes tragically implicated in a merciless world of gang violence.
From long resentments to deep secrets, an overdue family reunion erupts with drama when the matriarch makes a disturbing discovery.
Armed with a thirst for revenge, a vigilante makes justice her business after being hired by various women to seduce and humiliate their rapists.
A pregnant mother with terminal cancer leaves behind 18 sentimental gifts for her unborn daughter to receive every birthday until she reaches womanhood.
Upon his return to Istanbul, an expat writer-editor finds himself stranded inside a web of tangled relationships after his filmmaker friend vanishes.
Manipulation and personal vendettas collide when a con artist hires a young woman to assist with his scheme to marry a wealthy heiress.
Ready to do anything to get rich, a young man upends the Berlin property market with his shady pal, till the good times threaten to destroy it all.
Stripped of his heritage at a residential school, an indigenous student finds refuge on the rink when he discovers a passion for hockey.
While decluttering her home, a woman’s hefty house renovation leads her back to the past when she uncovers her ex-boyfriend’s belongings.
Driven and arrogant, film director Michael Curtiz deals with studio politics and family drama during the troubled production of "Casablanca" in 1942.
An aging soccer fanatic faces down the reality of his past while struggling to give himself and a young follower very different futures.
